meaning: 字母 E
sentences: The letter E is the most common letter in the English language. 字母 E 是英語中最常用的字母。
He marked the spot with a large capital E. 他用一個大寫的 E 標記了那個位置。

meaning: 艾 (巴比倫神)
sentences: Ea was the Babylonian god of wisdom and water. 艾是巴比倫的智慧與水之神。
Ancient myths describe the powers of Ea. 古代神話描述了艾的力量。

meaning: 每個
sentences: Each student in the class received a small gift. 班上的每個學生都收到了一份小禮物。
We should respect each other's opinions and feelings. 我們應該尊重彼此的意見和感受。

meaning: 到處；各處 (舊語)
sentences: Flowers were blooming eachwhere in the valley. 山谷裡到處都開滿了花。
He searched eachwhere for the missing keys. 他到處尋找丟失的鑰匙。

meaning: 渴望的
sentences: The students were very eager to learn about space exploration. 學生們非常渴望了解太空探索。
She is eager to start her new job at the tech company next week. 她渴望下週在科技公司開始她的新工作。

meaning: 可四热切地
sentences: The nurse checked the patient eagerly before bedtime. 護理師在睡前很eagerly地檢查病人。
We reviewed the project eagerly to avoid mistakes. 我們很eagerly地檢查專案，以避免出錯。

meaning: 渴望
sentences: We need more eagerness to solve this issue effectively. 我們需要更多eagerness才能有效解決這個問題。
Without eagerness, the team could not finish on time. 沒有eagerness，團隊就無法準時完成。

meaning: 鷹
sentences: The bald eagle is the national emblem of the United States. 白頭海雕是美國的國徽。
The eagle soared high above the mountains with its vast wings. 老鷹展翅在高山之上翱翔。

meaning: 像老鷹的
sentences: The man had sharp, eaglelike features. 那個人有著像老鷹般銳利的特徵。
The bird soared through the air with eaglelike grace. 那隻鳥以像老鷹般的優雅在空中翱翔。

meaning: 母鷹 (舊語)
sentences: The eagless watched over her nest from the high cliff. 母鷹從高聳的懸崖上守望著她的巢。
An eagless and her young were spotted on the mountain. 在山上發現了一隻母鷹和她的幼鳥。

meaning: 鷹石 (傳說中老鷹巢裡的石頭)
sentences: In ancient times, eaglestone was believed to have magical properties. 在古代，鷹石被認為具有神奇的特性。
He found an eaglestone near the base of the mountain. 他在山腳附近發現了一塊鷹石。

meaning: 幼鷹
sentences: The eaglet was learning how to fly. 幼鷹正在學習如何飛翔。
We watched the parent eagle feed the hungry eaglet. 我們看著親鳥鷹餵食飢餓的幼鷹。

meaning: 沉香木
sentences: Eaglewood is highly valued for its fragrant resin. 沉香木因其芬芳的樹脂而受到高度重視。
Incense made from eaglewood has a unique scent. 由沉香木製成的香有一種獨特的香味。

meaning: 涌潮
sentences: The eagre roared up the river mouth during the high tide. 漲潮時，涌潮咆哮著沖上河口。
Observers gathered to watch the spectacular eagre. 觀察者們聚集在一起觀看壯觀的涌潮。

meaning: 加 失事的,遇難的
sentences: The shepherd found an ean lamb after the storm. 暴風雨後，牧羊人發現一隻遇難的小羊。
An ean animal lay near the broken fence. 一隻受難的動物躺在破掉的圍欄旁。

meaning: 耳朵
sentences: She whispered something softly into my ear. 她在我耳邊輕聲說了些什麼。
He has a very good ear for music and can play by ear. 他對音樂很有天賦，可以聽音彈奏。

meaning: 耳垂
sentences: Our teacher asked us to memorize "ear lobe" for next week. 老師要我們把「ear lobe」背起來，下週要用。
You can use "ear lobe" in emails and daily conversations. 你可以在 email 和日常對話中使用「ear lobe」。

meaning: 耳朵痛
sentences: The child complained of a severe earache. 孩子抱怨耳朵非常痛。
A warm compress can sometimes help relieve an earache. 熱敷有時可以幫助減解耳朵痛。

meaning: 耳墜；耳環
sentences: She wore a pair of elegant silver earbobs. 她戴著一對優雅的銀耳墜。
The earbob sparkled in the light. 耳墜在光線下閃閃發光。

meaning: 護耳器
sentences: He wore earcaps to protect his ears from the cold wind. 他戴著護耳器以保護耳朵不受寒風吹襲。
Earcaps are often used by workers in noisy environments. 在喧鬧環境中工作的工人經常使用護耳器。

meaning: 小麥粒線蟲病
sentences: Earcockle is a disease caused by nematodes in wheat. 小麥粒線蟲病是由小麥中的線蟲引起的疾病。
The farmer checked his crops for signs of earcockle. 農民檢查他的莊稼是否有小麥粒線蟲病的跡象。

meaning: 耳環；耳藥水
sentences: The doctor prescribed eardrops for his infection. 醫生為他的感染開了耳藥水。
She chose a beautiful pearl eardrop for the wedding. 她為婚禮選了一對美麗的珍珠耳環。

meaning: 滴耳器；耳墜
sentences: He used an eardropper to administer the medicine. 他使用滴耳器來用藥。
The jewelry shop displayed several antique eardroppers. 珠寶店展示了幾件古董耳墜。

meaning: 耳膜
sentences: The doctor checked her eardrum during the exam. 醫師在檢查時查看了她的eardrum。
The pain in my eardrum disappeared after a short rest. 我稍微休息後，eardrum的疼痛就消失了。

meaning: 有耳朵（特定類型）。
sentences: He was a large- eared man. 他是一個大耳朵的人。
The report describes the result as eared. 報告稱此結果為預期結果。

meaning: 耳狀花
sentences: The plant has unique, earflower-like structures. 這種植物具有獨特的耳狀花結構。
They admired the delicate shape of the earflower. 他們讚賞耳狀花精緻的形狀。

meaning: 滔滔不絕的話；一頓責罵
sentences: His mother gave him an earful for coming home late. 他母親因他回家晚而給了他一頓訓斥。
I got an earful of gossip at the party last night. 昨晚在派對上我聽了一大堆八卦。

meaning: 耳孔
sentences: The doctor examined the patient's earhole for any blockage. 醫生檢查了病人的耳孔是否有任何阻塞。
Be careful not to poke anything into your earhole. 小心不要把任何東西戳進耳孔裡。

meaning: 縮帆索；結穗 (植物)
sentences: The sailors tightened the earing to secure the sail. 水手們拉緊縮帆索以固定帆。
The wheat is starting to show its earing. 小麥開始結穗了。

meaning: 鳳仙花；一種野生花卉
sentences: Orange earjewel flowers glowed beside the wet trail after the rain. 雨後，濕滑小徑旁的橘色鳳仙花閃著亮眼的色彩。
The guide pointed out earjewel growing near the shaded stream. 導覽員指出陰涼溪邊長著鳳仙花。

meaning: 伯爵
sentences: The earl invited the villagers to a winter dinner. 伯爵邀請村民參加冬季晚宴。
A young earl lived in the old stone castle. 一位年輕伯爵住在那座古老的石堡裡。

meaning: 耳垂；護耳片
sentences: She wore a silver ring on her left earlap. 她在左耳垂上戴了一枚銀色耳環。
The winter cap had a thick earlap to keep out the wind. 那頂冬帽有厚厚的護耳片可以擋風。

meaning: 伯爵爵位；伯爵領地
sentences: He inherited the earldom after his father's death. 父親過世後，他繼承了伯爵的爵位。
The old maps showed the borders of the earldom in red ink. 古老地圖用紅墨水標出了伯爵領地的邊界。

meaning: 無耳的
sentences: The sculptor made an earless stone figure for the garden. 雕塑家為花園做了一尊沒有耳朵的石像。
An earless mask hung on the wall of the museum gallery. 一張無耳面具掛在博物館展廳的牆上。

meaning: 小耳環
sentences: She chose a pearl earlet for the formal dinner. 她為正式晚宴選了一只珍珠小耳環。
The tiny gold earlet was easy to miss in the jewelry box. 那只小小的金耳環在首飾盒裡很容易被忽略。

meaning: 耳狀的；像耳朵的
sentences: The mushroom had earlike folds along its soft edge. 那朵蘑菇柔軟的邊緣有像耳朵一樣的皺褶。
The shell's earlike shape made it popular with collectors. 那枚貝殼耳狀的外形很受收藏家喜愛。

meaning: 提早；早到
sentences: Her earliness gave her time to review the slides before the meeting. 她提早到場，因此有時間在會議前再看一次投影片。
The earliness of spring surprised the farmers this year. 今年春天來得很早，讓農夫們感到意外。

meaning: 像伯爵的；具有伯爵氣派的
sentences: His earlish manner made the villagers laugh softly. 他那種像伯爵般的派頭讓村民忍不住輕笑。
The actor practiced an earlish voice for the historical drama. 那位演員為歷史劇練習帶有貴族氣派的口吻。

meaning: 耳旁捲髮
sentences: A dark earlock curled neatly beside his cheek. 一綹深色的耳旁捲髮整齊地垂在他臉頰邊。
The portrait showed the prince with a long earlock. 那幅肖像畫裡的王子留著長長的耳旁捲髮。

meaning: 伯爵身分；伯爵爵位
sentences: He accepted the duties of his earlship with caution. 他謹慎地承擔起伯爵身分帶來的責任。
The family letters often mentioned the burden of earlship. 家族書信中常提到伯爵爵位帶來的負擔。

meaning: 早期的
sentences: I usually wake up early to go for a run before work. 我通常早起，在上班前去跑步。
The early bird catches the worm. 早起的鳥兒有蟲吃。

meaning: 指定用途；標記
sentences: The council earmarked part of the budget for playground repairs. 市議會將部分預算指定用於修繕遊樂場。
Her careful notes earmarked the pages she wanted to revisit later. 她仔細的筆記標出了之後想重讀的頁面。

meaning: 耳套
sentences: He hurt his earmuff during basketball practice. 他在打籃球時弄傷了earmuff。
The doctor checked her earmuff during the exam. 醫師在檢查時查看了她的earmuff。

meaning: 賺
sentences: He works hard to earn enough money to support his family. 他努力工作以賺取足夠的錢來扶養家人。
She managed to earn a lot of respect from her colleagues. 她設法贏得了同事們的許多尊重。

meaning: 有賺錢者,領工資者
sentences: Her father was the main earner in the family. 她父親是家裡主要賺錢的人。
A steady earner can help support the household. 收入穩定的人可以幫忙支撐家計。

meaning: 認真
sentences: She gave an earnest promise to finish the project on time today. 她今天鄭重（認真）承諾會準時完成專案。
He is an earnest and hardworking student who always gets marks. 他是一個認真且勤奮的學生，總是拿高分。

meaning: 誠懇地；認真地
sentences: He spoke earnestly about the need to protect the river. 他誠懇地談到保護河流的必要性。
The students listened earnestly as the coach explained the plan. 教練說明計畫時，學生們都很認真地聆聽。

meaning: 誠懇；認真
sentences: Her earnestness made everyone trust her promise. 她的誠懇讓大家都相信她的承諾。
The manager admired the young intern's earnestness. 經理很欣賞那位年輕實習生的認真態度。

meaning: 焦慮的；渴望的
sentences: She gave him an earnful look before the results were announced. 成績公布前，她用焦急的眼神看著他。
The child's earnful face showed how much he wanted to join the team. 那孩子渴望的表情顯示出他有多想加入隊伍。

meaning: 賺取；獲得
sentences: Earning enough money took years of steady work. 賺到足夠的錢花了多年穩定的努力。
She focused on earning her certificate before looking for a new job. 她先專注於取得證照，再找新工作。

meaning: 薪水,工資,收入
sentences: Her monthly earnings cover rent and food. 她每月的收入足夠支付房租和食物。
The shop owner checked the day's earnings before closing. 店主在打烊前查看當天的營收。

meaning: 耳機
sentences: I usually use my earphones to listen to music while I'm jogging. 我慢跑時通常使用耳機聽音樂。
Could you please lend me your pair of wireless earphones for a bit? 能請妳借我妳那副無線耳機用一下嗎？

meaning: 掏耳器
sentences: The small steel earpick was kept in a clean case. 那支小鋼製掏耳器被收在乾淨的盒子裡。
He bought a travel earpick at the pharmacy near the station. 他在車站附近的藥局買了一支旅行用掏耳器。

meaning: 耳機；聽筒
sentences: The singer adjusted her earpiece before walking onstage. 那位歌手上台前先調整了耳機。
A soft voice came through the earpiece during the live broadcast. 現場轉播時，一道輕柔的聲音從聽筒裡傳來。

meaning: 耳塞
sentences: He wore an earplug at the concert to protect his hearing. 他在演唱會戴上耳塞以保護聽力。
The swimmer packed a bright orange earplug in her bag. 那位游泳者在包裡放了一個亮橘色的耳塞。

meaning: 聽力所及範圍；可聽見的距離
sentences: Keep your private talk out of the children's earreach. 別讓孩子們聽見你們的私下談話。
The drummer stayed just within earreach of the conductor's count. 鼓手待在剛好聽得見指揮拍子的距離內。

meaning: 押耳環,耳飾
sentences: Please earring the plan before noon. 請在中午前earring計畫。
The guide earringed the plan carefully yesterday. 導覽員昨天仔細地earring了計畫。

meaning: 耳環）
sentences: She wore a pair of beautiful pearl earrings to the wedding. 她戴了一對漂亮的珍珠耳環參加婚禮。
He bought his mother a set of gold earrings for her birthday. 他買了一套金耳環送給母親過生日。

meaning: 戴耳環的
sentences: The earringed dancer smiled as the music began. 戴著耳環的舞者在音樂響起時露出笑容。
An earringed portrait hung above the fireplace. 一幅人物戴著耳環的肖像掛在壁爐上方。

meaning: 螺絲扣耳環
sentences: She preferred an earscrew because it stayed secure all day. 她偏好螺絲扣耳環，因為整天都不容易鬆脫。
The jeweler repaired the old silver earscrew for free. 那位珠寶匠免費修好了那只舊銀耳環。

meaning: 回聽力範圍
sentences: The success of the project depends on earshot. 這個專案是否成功取決於earshot。
Without earshot, the team could not finish on time. 沒有earshot，團隊就無法準時完成。

meaning: 刺耳的聲音；難聽的東西
sentences: The broken speaker turned the song into an earsore. 壞掉的喇叭把那首歌變成了刺耳的噪音。
For him, the constant drilling was an absolute earsore. 對他來說，持續的鑽孔聲實在很難聽。

meaning: 震耳欲聾的
sentences: An earsplitting cheer rose from the stadium after the final goal. 最後一球進門後，球場裡響起震耳欲聾的歡呼聲。
The truck's horn was so earsplitting that everyone covered their ears. 卡車喇叭聲大得震耳欲聾，大家都摀住了耳朵。

meaning: 耳片；耳狀小突片
sentences: The clay jar had a small eartab on each side for lifting. 那個陶罐兩側各有一個小耳片方便提起。
A torn eartab made the old boot harder to pull on. 破掉的耳片讓那雙舊靴子更難穿上。

meaning: 地球
sentences: The Earth is the third planet from the sun in our solar system. 地球是距離太陽第三近的行星。
We must take steps to protect the environment and save the Earth. 我們必須採取措施保護環境，拯救地球。

meaning: 犁壁；翻土板
sentences: The farmer cleaned the earthboard after plowing the wet field. 農夫在犁完濕田後清理了犁壁上的泥土。
A damaged earthboard made the furrow rough and uneven. 受損的翻土板讓犁溝變得粗糙不平。

meaning: 生於地球的；塵世所生的
sentences: The story contrasts earthborn people with visitors from the stars. 那個故事把地球出生的人和來自星際的訪客作對比。
Even in fantasy poems, the hero keeps an earthborn kindness. 即使在奇幻詩篇中，那位英雄仍保有凡間的溫厚。

meaning: 粗俗的；缺乏教養的
sentences: The critic dismissed the villain as earthbred and narrow-minded. 評論家斥那個反派粗俗又心胸狹窄。
His earthbred habits embarrassed the court officials. 他那種粗鄙的習氣讓宮廷官員感到難堪。

meaning: 土龍；傳說中的龍
sentences: In the legend, an earthdrake slept beneath the mountain. 傳說中，一條土龍沉睡在山底下。
The painter gave the earthdrake dark scales and golden eyes. 畫家替那條土龍畫上深色鱗片和金色眼睛。

meaning: 接地的
sentences: The technician checked that the metal case was properly earthed. 技師確認那個金屬外殼已正確接地。
An earthed wire reduced the risk of electric shock. 接地的電線降低了觸電的風險。

meaning: 泥土做的；陶製的
sentences: An earthen jar stood in the cool corner of the kitchen. 廚房陰涼的角落裡放著一只陶土罐。
After the rain, the old village looked softer with its earthen walls. 雨後，古老村莊的土牆讓整個景色顯得更柔和。

meaning: 冷酷粗鄙的；世俗而無情的
sentences: The poet condemned the merchant's earthenhearted greed. 詩人譴責那商人冷酷而粗鄙的貪婪。
She refused to become earthenhearted just to succeed in politics. 她拒絕為了在政壇成功而變得冷酷無情。

meaning: 陶器
sentences: The market sold blue earthenware bowls and plates. 市場上賣著藍色的陶碗和陶盤。
Archaeologists found broken earthenware near the ancient oven. 考古學家在古老的爐灶旁發現了破碎的陶器。

meaning: 山崩；坍方
sentences: Heavy rain triggered an earthfall above the narrow road. 大雨在狹窄道路上方引發了山崩。
Workers cleared the earthfall before sunrise. 工人在日出前清除了坍方的土石。

meaning: 立柱直接入土的
sentences: Archaeologists uncovered an earthfast hall from the early settlement. 考古學家挖出了早期聚落的一座立柱入土式大廳。
The shed used an earthfast design instead of a stone base. 那座棚屋採用立柱直接入土的設計，而不是石基。

meaning: 土苦草；一種野生草本植物
sentences: The botanist found earthgall blooming at the edge of the marsh. 植物學家在沼澤邊發現土苦草正在開花。
Old field guides list earthgall among native meadow herbs. 老式野外圖鑑把土苦草列為草地原生香草植物之一。

meaning: 掘土者；在土地裡辛苦討生活的人
sentences: He joked that every gardener is an earthgrubber by springtime. 他開玩笑說，每個園丁到了春天都成了掘土者。
The novel portrays the old farmer as a patient earthgrubber. 那本小說把老農描寫成一個耐心在土地裡勞作的人。

meaning: 地球人；地球居民
sentences: The science fiction ambassador greeted each Earthian with curiosity. 那位科幻故事中的大使帶著好奇向每位地球人致意。
To the visitors, every Earthian custom seemed fascinating. 對那些訪客來說，每一種地球人的習俗都很迷人。

meaning: 泥土氣息；質樸感
sentences: The soup had an earthiness from mushrooms and roasted roots. 那鍋湯因蘑菇和烤根菜而帶有濃厚的泥土香氣。
Critics praised the novel for its earthiness and plain wisdom. 評論家稱讚那本小說帶有質樸感與平實的智慧。

meaning: 小型地球模型
sentences: The physics teacher placed an earthkin beside the lamp to explain seasons. 物理老師把一個小型地球模型放在燈旁解釋四季形成。
A brass earthkin stood on the shelf in the old observatory. 舊天文台的架子上放著一個黃銅小型地球模型。

meaning: 無土的；沒有土地的
sentences: The seedlings grew in an earthless mix inside the greenhouse. 那些幼苗在溫室裡的無土介質中生長。
Astronauts imagined an earthless station drifting in silence. 太空人想像著一座沒有土地的太空站靜靜漂浮著。

meaning: 地球反照光
sentences: A faint earthlight softened the dark side of the moon. 微弱的地球反照光柔化了月球背光的一面。
The astronomer waited for clear skies to photograph the earthlight. 那位天文學家等待晴朗夜空來拍攝地球反照光。

meaning: 類地的；像地球的
sentences: Scientists are searching for earthlike planets around nearby stars. 科學家正在鄰近恆星周圍尋找類地行星。
The artist painted an earthlike landscape with blue oceans and white clouds. 藝術家畫出了一幅有藍色海洋和白色雲層的類地景觀。

meaning: 世俗性；塵世氣息
sentences: The painting balances holiness with a gentle earthliness. 那幅畫在神聖感與柔和的塵世氣息之間取得平衡。
Readers admired the earthliness of the poet's language. 讀者欣賞那位詩人語言中的世俗而真實的氣息。

meaning: 地球人
sentences: In the movie, the alien tried to speak politely to every earthling it met. 在電影裡，那個外星人試著有禮貌地和遇到的每個地球人說話。
The joke made the robot sound more human than the earthlings around it. 那個笑話讓機器人聽起來比周圍的地球人更像人類。

meaning: 與地球或這個世界有關，而不是天堂；陸地的。
sentences: earthly joys 塵世的歡樂
The Garden of Earthly Delights 人間歡樂庭園

meaning: 造地者；創造大地者
sentences: In the myth, the Earthmaker shaped mountains from wet clay. 在神話中，造地者用濕泥塑成群山。
The storyteller called the river the oldest earthmaker in the valley. 說書人稱那條河是山谷裡最古老的造地者。

meaning: 造地；地貌形成
sentences: The lecture explained earthmaking in river deltas over thousands of years. 講座說明了河口三角洲在數千年間的造地過程。
Volcanic ash can play a role in slow earthmaking. 火山灰可能在緩慢的地貌形成中扮演角色。

meaning: 地豆；一種塊根植物
sentences: The forager dug up an earthnut near the woodland path. 採集者在林間小徑旁挖出一顆地豆塊根。
An earthnut once served as a useful wild food in lean seasons. 地豆曾在缺糧季節成為實用的野生食物。

meaning: 地豆；地下結莢的豆科植物
sentences: The climber recognized earthpea by its hidden pods underground. 那位登山者從地下的豆莢認出了地豆藤。
Earthpea can spread quietly through the edge of a damp forest. 地豆藤會沿著潮濕森林的邊緣悄悄蔓延。

meaning: 地震
sentences: The city was hit by a massive earthquake several years ago. 這座城市幾年前曾遭受大地震襲擊。
Earthquakes are a common natural phenomenon in this region. 地震是這個地區常見的自然現象。

meaning: 被地震震動的
sentences: The earthquaked village needed shelter before nightfall. 那座遭地震震動的村莊在天黑前需要安置。
Workers inspected the earthquaked bridge for hidden cracks. 工人檢查那座受地震影響的橋樑是否有暗裂。

meaning: 受地震侵襲的；被地震搖動的
sentences: The poem describes an earthquaken city at dawn. 那首詩描寫了一座黎明時分遭地震侵襲的城市。
Rescuers entered the earthquaken district with great care. 救難人員非常小心地進入那個受地震重創的區域。

meaning: 地震般震動的；劇烈震撼的
sentences: An earthquaking roar rolled across the valley at night. 夜裡，一陣如地震般的轟鳴聲傳過山谷。
The audience felt an earthquaking pulse from the giant speakers. 觀眾從巨大的音箱裡感受到一股地震般的震動。

meaning: 地球反照光
sentences: The photographer captured the moon with a silver wash of earthshine. 那位攝影師拍下了覆著一層銀色地球反照光的月亮。
Earthshine is easiest to notice when the crescent moon is thin. 當新月很細時，最容易看見地球反照光。

meaning: 地震
sentences: A sudden earthshock rattled the windows before noon. 中午前，一場突如其來的地震震動了窗戶。
People rushed into the street after the first earthshock. 第一次地震後，人們立刻衝到街上。

meaning: 土滑；山崩
sentences: The earthslide blocked the mountain road for two days. 那場土滑讓山路中斷了兩天。
Engineers studied the hillside after the earthslide. 工程師在山崩後檢查了那片山坡。

meaning: 紫堇；一種野生草本植物
sentences: Soft earthsmoke flowers trembled in the spring wind. 柔細的紫堇花在春風中微微顫動。
The herbal garden kept a patch of earthsmoke near the stone wall. 那座藥草園在石牆旁保留了一小片紫堇。

meaning: 地星菌；星形真菌
sentences: After the rain, an earthstar opened on the forest floor. 雨後，一朵地星菌在森林地面上裂開展出。
The child knelt to study the strange shape of the earthstar. 那個孩子蹲下來研究地星菌奇特的形狀。

meaning: 地舌菌
sentences: A cluster of earthtongue stood upright in the damp moss. 一簇地舌菌直立在潮濕的苔蘚間。
The field guide warned us not to confuse earthtongue with other dark fungi. 野外圖鑑提醒我們別把地舌菌和其他深色真菌搞混。

meaning: 土牆
sentences: The old fort still had an earthwall around its outer edge. 那座古堡外圍仍保留著一道土牆。
Grass covered the earthwall after many quiet years. 經過多年寧靜歲月後，青草覆滿了那道土牆。

meaning: 朝向地球的；向下的
sentences: The capsule began its earthward journey at sunrise. 那個太空艙在日出時開始朝向地球返回。
An earthward view filled the window of the station. 一幅朝向地球的景色充滿了太空站的窗外。

meaning: 朝向地面地；向地球地
sentences: The falling seeds drifted earthwards in the afternoon light. 掉落的種子在午後的光線中朝向地面飄下。
The satellite slowly turned earthwards before reentry. 那顆衛星在重返大氣前緩緩轉向地球。

meaning: 堤防或其他土製建築物；特別是：用作野戰工事的一個
sentences: The astronomer pointed to the earthwork during the evening lesson. 天文學家在晚課指著土方工程。
A faint trace of earthwork changed the look of the night sky. 一絲土工痕跡改變了夜空的面貌。

meaning: 陸生環節動物蠕蟲（寡毛綱）；特別是：許多廣泛分佈的雌雄同體蠕蟲科（蚓科）的任何一種，通過剛毛在土壤中移動並以腐爛的有機物為食
sentences: Researchers observed a earthworm near the edge of the field at dawn. 黎明時分，研究人員在田地邊緣附近觀察到了一條蚯蚓。
The illustration showed the earthworm in its natural setting. 插圖展示了自然環境中的蚯蚓。

meaning: 類似於泥土或土壤（即地球）。
sentences: The earthy smell of fresh turned loam told me the farmer had started plowing this morning, the definitive sign of spring for me. 新鮮翻耕的壤土的泥土氣味告訴我，農民今天早上已經開始犁地，這對我來說是春天的明確標誌。
Something described as earthy is resembling dirt or soil (i.e. earth). 被描述為泥土的東西類似於泥土或土壤（即地球）。

meaning: 耳垢，耳屎
sentences: You should avoid using cotton swabs to clean earwax. 你應該避免使用棉花棒來清理耳垢。
The doctor used a special tool to remove the excess earwax. 醫生使用特殊工具清除了多餘的耳垢。

meaning: 一個罕見的或專門的英語術語，記錄為“earwig”。
sentences: An earwig crawled under the flowerpot after the rain. 雨後，一隻蠼螋爬到花盆下面。
She brushed an earwig off the picnic blanket. 她把一隻蠼螋從野餐毯上撥掉。

meaning: 一個罕見的或專門的英語術語，記錄為“earwigginess”。
sentences: The dark shed had an earwigginess that made the children step back. 那間昏暗棚屋有種像藏著蠼螋的陰森感，讓孩子們退了一步。
He disliked the earwigginess of the damp garden corner. 他不喜歡潮濕花園角落那種爬蟲出沒的感覺。

meaning: 罕用：蠼螋很多的；滿是蠼螋的
sentences: The shed was so earwiggy that we did not want to stay inside. 那間小棚子蠼螋多到讓我們不想待在裡面。
They avoided the earwiggy corner of the garden after dark. 天黑後，他們避開了花園裡蠼螋特別多的角落。

meaning: 無意中聽到某事的人；特別是：對所聽到的內容進行報告的人
sentences: The earwitness told the police what she had heard in the hallway. 那位聽到事件的人告訴警方她在走廊聽見的內容。
An earwitness can help when no one saw the accident happen. 沒有人看見事故發生時，聽到聲音的證人也能提供幫助。

meaning: 玉米穗蟲
sentences: Researchers observed a earworm near the edge of the field at dawn. 黎明時分，研究人員在田野邊緣附近觀察到了一隻耳蟲。
The illustration showed the earworm in its natural setting. 插圖展示了自然環境中的耳蟲。

meaning: 一個罕見的或專門的英文術語，記錄為earwort。
sentences: The gardener found earwort growing beside the old wall. 園丁在老牆旁發現耳草。
Earwort spread quickly in the damp corner of the yard. 耳草在院子潮濕的角落迅速蔓延。

meaning: 舒適
sentences: The new software was designed to improve the ease of use. 這款新軟體旨在提高易用性。
She spoke with ease and confidence during the presentation. 她在簡報時表現得從容自信。

meaning: 適合提供輕鬆或休息：安寧的。如何用輕鬆造句
sentences: The note sounded easeful, so the editor rewrote it. 這段文字聽起來很安適，所以編輯把它改寫了。
She noticed an easeful tone in the short message. 她注意到短訊裡有一種安適的語氣。

meaning: 舒服的狀態。如何用輕鬆造句
sentences: She spoke easefully when she answered the question. 她回答問題時說得很輕鬆地。
He handled the small mistake easefully and kept working. 他很輕鬆地處理小錯誤，然後繼續工作。

meaning: 一個罕見的或專門的英語術語，記錄為輕鬆。
sentences: The easefulness of the quiet room helped her fall asleep. 安靜房間的舒適感幫助她入睡。
A warm bath brought easefulness after the long trip. 長途旅行後，熱水澡帶來舒緩放鬆的感覺。

meaning: 用於支撐某物的框架（例如藝術家的畫布）
sentences: The painter placed a blank canvas on the easel. 畫家把空白畫布放在畫架上。
A small easel stood near the classroom window. 一個小畫架立在教室窗邊。

meaning: 沒有緩解或休息：不斷的
sentences: Her answer sounded easeless during the meeting. 她在會議中的回答聽起來很沒有緩解或休息。
They wanted a more easeless design for the room. 他們想要一個更沒有緩解或休息的房間設計。

meaning: 緩解或緩解（如不適）的行為或方式
sentences: The medicine gave him some easement from the pain. 藥物讓他的疼痛稍微緩解。
The city granted an easement for a path across the field. 市政府核准在田地上通行的小路地役權。

meaning: 一種可以緩解的
sentences: The nurse used a small easer to make the bandage less tight. 護理師用一個輔助工具讓繃帶不要那麼緊。
A good handle can be an easer when carrying a heavy box. 搬重箱子時，好握把可以減輕負擔。

meaning: easy的比較級形式：more easy
sentences: Easier said than done! 說起來容易做起來難！
The team responded easier to the change. 團隊對變化的反應更容易。

meaning: 造成或涉及很少的困難或不適。如何用簡單造句。 Easy 的同義字討論
sentences: This is the easiest route to the train station. 這是去火車站最簡單的路線。
She chose the easiest question and answered it first. 她選了最簡單的題目先回答。

meaning: 比平常或預期更快或可能。
sentences: not easily offended 不容易被冒犯
I get distracted very easily. 我很容易分心。

meaning: 免於困難或困苦的自由。如何用輕鬆造句
sentences: The easiness of the recipe surprised the new cook. 這道食譜的簡單程度讓新手廚師很驚訝。
He liked the easiness of paying by phone. 他喜歡用手機付款的便利。

meaning: 舒服的狀態。如何用輕鬆造句
sentences: The note sounded easing, so the editor rewrote it. 這段文字聽起來很輕鬆，所以編輯把它改寫了。
She noticed an easing tone in the short message. 她注意到短訊裡有一種輕鬆的語氣。

meaning: 東方
sentences: The sun rises in the east and sets in the west. 太陽從東方升起，從西方落下。
Taiwan is located to the east of the Asian continent. 台灣位於亞洲大陸的東邊。

meaning: 左右轉向以便向東航行；廣義： 向東： 向東
sentences: The boat went eastabout to avoid the storm. 船向東繞行以避開暴風雨。
They sailed eastabout around the island before sunset. 他們在日落前向東繞過小島航行。

meaning: 向東移動或前進。
sentences: The eastbound train is late again! 東行列車又晚點了！
Something described as eastbound is moving or heading towards the east. 被描述為東行的物體正在向東移動或前進。

meaning: 東風（從東邊吹來的風）；尤其是，一個堅強的人；一場風暴。
sentences: The term easter refers to an easterly wind (a wind blowing from the east); especially, a strong one; a storm of such winds. 復活節一詞指的是東風（從東方吹來的風）；尤其是，一個堅強的人；一場這樣的風暴。
The lesson introduced easter as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了復活節作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 一個國家東邊的人——尤其用於來自波羅的海城市的德國商人，他們在英國進行貿易或在外國港口與英國人競爭
sentences: Her answer sounded easterling during the meeting. 她在會議中的回答聽起來很國家東邊的人。
They wanted a more easterling design for the room. 他們想要一個更國家東邊的人的房間設計。

meaning: 面向東方；指向東方。
sentences: an easterly course or voyage 向東的航線或航程
The report describes the result as easterly. 報告將結果描述為東風。

meaning: 東
sentences: The city is located on the beautiful eastern coast of the island. 這座城市位於島嶼美麗的東海岸。
Many eastern cultures have a long and rich history. 許多東方文化都擁有悠久且豐富的歷史。

meaning: 東方本地人或居民；特別是：美國東部的本地人或居民
sentences: The easterner missed the snowy winters of his hometown. 那位東部人想念家鄉下雪的冬天。
An easterner helped us understand the local customs. 一位東方居民幫我們了解當地習俗。

meaning: 最遠的東邊。如何用 最東造句
sentences: The easternmost room gets sunlight first in the morning. 最東邊的房間早上最先照到陽光。
We walked to the easternmost gate of the park. 我們走到公園最東邊的入口。

meaning: 東方進步。如何用東邊造句
sentences: The note sounded easting, so the editor rewrote it. 這段文字聽起來很東邊，所以編輯把它改寫了。
She noticed an easting tone in the short message. 她注意到短訊裡有一種東邊的語氣。

meaning: 一個罕見的或專門的英語術語，記錄為“eastland”。
sentences: Ships sailed along the eastland coast at dawn. 船隻在清晨沿著東部海岸航行。
Many families moved to the eastland after the harvest. 收成結束後，許多家庭搬到東部地區。

meaning: 最東端
sentences: The eastmost house on the street has a blue door. 這條街最東邊的房子有一扇藍色的門。
We set up our tent near the eastmost hill. 我們在最東邊的小山附近搭帳篷。

meaning: 向東的方向或區域。
sentences: The term eastward refers to the direction or area lying to the east. 術語“向東”是指位於東方的方向或區域。
The lesson introduced eastward as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「向東」這個術語，這是一個值得理解的有用術語。

meaning: 朝向或來自東方：向東
sentences: The falling seeds drifted eastwardly in the afternoon light. 落下的種子在午後的陽光下向東飄去。
The capsule slowly turned eastwardly before reentry. 太空艙在重返大氣層之前緩慢向東轉向。

meaning: 簡單的
sentences: The exam was much easier than I had expected. 考試比我預想的要簡單得多。
It is easy to get lost in the narrow streets of the old town. 在舊城區狹窄的街道上很容易迷路。

meaning: 風格或方式上輕鬆隨興。如何用隨和造句
sentences: The note sounded easygoing, so the editor rewrote it. 這段文字聽起來很隨和，所以編輯把它改寫了。
She noticed an easygoing tone in the short message. 她注意到短訊裡有一種隨和的語氣。

meaning: 風格或方式上輕鬆隨興。如何用隨和造句
sentences: Her easygoingness made the whole team feel relaxed. 她的隨和讓整個團隊都放鬆下來。
People liked his easygoingness at family gatherings. 親友聚會時，大家都喜歡他的隨和。

meaning: 吃
sentences: It's important to eat a balanced diet for good health. 均衡飲食對健康非常重要。
What would you like to eat for dinner tonight? 你今晚晚餐想吃什麼？

meaning: 一個罕見的或專門的英語術語，記錄為可食用性。
sentences: The cook checked the eatability of the berries before serving them. 廚師在上菜前確認那些莓果是否可食用。
Freshness affects the eatability of seafood. 新鮮度會影響海鮮的可食性。

meaning: 適合或能夠食用
sentences: The food was eatable, so she packed it for lunch. 食物還能吃，所以她把它裝成午餐。
Only the eatable parts of the fruit went into the salad. 只有可食用的水果部分被放進沙拉裡。

meaning: 一個罕見的或專門的英語術語，記錄為可食用性。
sentences: The mushroom guide warned readers about the eatableness of wild fungi. 蘑菇指南提醒讀者注意野生真菌是否可食用。
The chef tested the eatableness of the root after boiling it. 廚師把根莖煮過後測試它是否能吃。

meaning: 馬和牛可食用的草的生長，特別是在第二次割草之後
sentences: The farmer saved the eatage for the cattle. 農夫把可食用的牧草留給牛群。
After the second mowing, the field still had enough eatage for the horses. 第二次割草後，田裡仍有足夠的草料給馬吃。

meaning: 一個罕見或專門的英語術語，記錄為 eatberry。
sentences: Children picked eatberry from the bush beside the trail. 孩子們從小路旁的灌木上採可食莓果。
The birds gathered where eatberry grew thickly. 鳥群聚集在可食莓果茂密生長的地方。

meaning: 已經被吃的消耗掉了。
sentences: The cake was already eaten when I came home. 我回家時蛋糕已經被吃掉了。
She found an eaten apple on the kitchen table. 她在廚房桌上看到一顆被吃過的蘋果。

meaning: 吃東西的人或動物。
sentences: a very fussy eater 非常挑食
The term eater refers to a person or animal who eats. 食者一詞是指吃東西的人或動物。

meaning: 午餐餐廳, 餐廳
sentences: We found a small eatery near the station. 我們在車站附近找到一家小餐館。
The eatery serves hot soup every morning. 那家餐館每天早上供應熱湯。

meaning: 養出來就是為了吃的。
sentences: eating chickens; eating quails 吃雞；吃鵪鶉
The report describes the result as eating. 報告將結果描述為進食。

meaning: 經由口腔作為食物攝取：依序攝取、咀嚼、吞嚥。如何用吃造句
sentences: She bought fresh eats at the market. 她在市場買了新鮮的經由口腔作為食物攝取：依序攝取、咀嚼、吞嚥。
eats tasted better after it was cooked slowly. 經由口腔作為食物攝取：依序攝取、咀嚼、吞嚥慢慢烹煮後味道更好。

meaning: 懸在牆上的屋頂的下邊界——通常以複數形式使用
sentences: A well-used eave rested on the table beside the other equipment. 桌上的其他設備旁邊放著一個用過的屋簷。
The technician reached for the eave before starting the task. 技術人員在開始任務前把手伸向屋簷。

meaning: 具有特定類型的屋簷。如何用 屋簷造句
sentences: The note sounded eaved, so the editor rewrote it. 這段文字聽起來很屋簷，所以編輯把它改寫了。
She noticed an eaved tone in the short message. 她注意到短訊裡有一種屋簷的語氣。

meaning: 一個罕見的或專門的英語術語，記錄為竊聽。
sentences: His eavedrop outside the kitchen door made everyone uncomfortable. 他在廚房門外偷聽，讓大家都很不自在。
The child made a quiet eavedrop while the adults talked. 大人談話時，那孩子悄悄偷聽。

meaning: 疑似非標準或極罕見拼寫；正式寫作前應再查證。
sentences: The handwritten note seems to read eaver, but the spelling should be checked against the original source. 那張手寫便條看起來像是這個拼法，但還是要對照原始來源再確認。
We found eaver in the old record and marked it for later verification. 我們在舊紀錄裡看到這個拼法，並把它標記起來留待後續查證。

meaning: 屋簷
sentences: The birds built a nest under the eaves of the house. 鳥兒在房子的屋簷下築了巢。
Water was dripping from the eaves after the rain. 雨後水從屋簷上滴下來。

meaning: 偷偷地聽私下說的話
sentences: Please do not eavesdrop outside the meeting room. 請不要在會議室外偷聽。
It is rude to eavesdrop on a private phone call. 偷聽私人電話是不禮貌的。

meaning: 一個偷聽的人
sentences: The eavesdropper stood quietly behind the door. 偷聽者靜靜站在門後。
No one trusted the eavesdropper after the secret was shared. 秘密傳出去後，沒有人再信任那個偷聽的人。

meaning: 偷偷地聽一些私人的事情的行為。如何用竊聽造句
sentences: Eavesdropping can hurt trust between friends. 偷聽會傷害朋友之間的信任。
She stopped eavesdropping as soon as she realized the talk was private. 她一發現那是私人談話，就停止偷聽。

meaning: 潮水向大海回流。如何在句子中使用退潮。退潮的同義詞討論
sentences: The ebb left small shells on the wet sand. 退潮後，濕沙上留下小貝殼。
We waited for the ebb before walking across the rocks. 我們等退潮後才走過岩石區。

meaning: 一個罕見的或專門的英語術語，記錄為 ebbman。
sentences: The ebbman checked the boats when the tide went out. 退潮時，海邊工人檢查那些船。
An old ebbman knew the safest path across the wet sand. 一位老潮汐工人知道穿過濕沙地最安全的路。

meaning: 植物科（埃本目），包括喬木和灌木（如烏木和柿子），木材非常堅硬，葉子完整，雌雄異株或很少有完美的花朵，隨後是肉質漿果
sentences: Botanists describe a specimen as ebenaceous when it is family of plants (order Ebenales) comprising trees and shrubs (such as the ebony and persimmon) with very hard wood, entire leaves, and dioecious or rarely perfect flowers succeeded by fleshy berries. 當一個標本是由喬木和灌木（如烏木和柿子）組成的植物家族（埃本目）時，植物學家將其描述為“植物科”，其木材非常堅硬，葉子完整，雌雄異體或很少有完美的花朵，隨後是肉質漿果。
Under the lens, the plant looked ebenaceous to the researchers. 在鏡頭下，研究人員認為這種植物看起來很溫和。

meaning: 一個罕見的或專門的英語術語，記錄為 ebeneous。
sentences: Her answer sounded ebeneous during the meeting. 她在會議中的回答聽起來很ebeneous。
They wanted a more ebeneous design for the room. 他們想要一個更ebeneous的房間設計。

meaning: 伊博
sentences: The story mentioned an eboe family living near the river. 故事提到一個住在河邊的伊博家庭。
She read about eboe traders in the old history book. 她在舊歷史書裡讀到伊博商人。

meaning: 烏木
sentences: The table had a deep ebon shine after polishing. 那張桌子拋光後呈現深黑的烏木光澤。
She wore an ebon necklace with a silver clasp. 她戴著一條帶銀扣的烏木項鍊。

meaning: 一個罕見的或專門的英語術語，記錄為 ebonist。
sentences: The ebonist repaired the black wooden chair by hand. 烏木工匠親手修好那張黑色木椅。
A skilled ebonist carved small flowers into the cabinet. 熟練的烏木工匠在櫃子上刻出小花。

meaning: 硬橡膠，尤其是黑色時
sentences: The old radio had a handle made of ebonite. 那台舊收音機有一個硬橡膠做的把手。
Ebonite was once common in combs and instrument parts. 硬橡膠以前常用於梳子和儀器零件。

meaning: 使木材具有烏木的顏色或紋理。
sentences: They tried to ebonize the problem before lunch. 他們試著在午餐前讓木材具有烏木的顏色這個問題。
Please ebonize the details before you send the report. 送出報告前，請先讓木材具有烏木的顏色細節。

meaning: 皮膚黝黑；黑色的;尤其是對非裔美國人。
sentences: She chose an ebony frame for the family photo. 她為全家福選了一個烏黑的相框。
The old piano had an ebony shine. 那架舊鋼琴有烏黑的光澤。

meaning: 無苞片。
sentences: Botanists describe a specimen as ebracteate when it is Having no bracts. 當一個標本沒有苞片時，植物學家將其描述為無苞片。
Under the lens, the plant looked ebracteate to the researchers. 在鏡頭下，研究人員看到這株植物看起來已無苞片。

meaning: 無小苞片。
sentences: Botanists describe a specimen as ebracteolate when it is Having no bracteoles. 當一個標本沒有小苞片時，植物學家將其描述為無小苞片。
Under the lens, the plant looked ebracteolate to the researchers. 在鏡頭下，研究人員發現該植物看起來沒有苞片。

meaning: 醉;酣。
sentences: Her answer sounded ebriate during the meeting. 她在會議中的回答聽起來很醉。
They wanted a more ebriate design for the room. 他們想要一個更醉的房間設計。

meaning: 醉酒、醉酒的狀態。
sentences: His ebriety made it unsafe for him to drive home. 他的醉酒狀態讓他開車回家很危險。
The officer noticed signs of ebriety during the stop. 警員臨檢時注意到醉酒跡象。

meaning: 醉酒或酒精中毒，尤其是一種習慣狀態。
sentences: Long ebriosity damaged his health and his work. 長期酗酒損害了他的健康和工作。
The doctor warned him about the risks of ebriosity. 醫生警告他酗酒的風險。

meaning: 有酗酒傾向。
sentences: The capsule began its ebrious journey at sunrise. 太空艙在日出時開始了它的艱難旅程。
An ebrious view filled the station window. 車站的窗戶充滿了令人窒息的景色。

meaning: 罕見或專門的英語術語，記錄為 ebriously。
sentences: He spoke ebriously after drinking too much wine. 他喝太多酒後，說話帶著醉意。
She laughed ebriously at the noisy party. 她在吵鬧的派對上醉醺醺地笑著。

meaning: 煮沸。
sentences: The water began to ebullate in the small pot. 小鍋裡的水開始沸騰。
She waited for the soup to ebullate before lowering the heat. 她等湯開始滾後才把火轉小。

meaning: 沸騰或冒泡；沸騰。
sentences: Her ebullience filled the room with energy. 她的熱情活力讓整個房間充滿能量。
The coach praised the team for its ebullience after the win. 勝利後，教練稱讚球隊的熱情。

meaning: 熱情洋溢
sentences: The child's ebulliency made everyone smile. 那孩子的活潑熱情讓大家都笑了。
His ebulliency returned when he heard the good news. 聽到好消息後，他又恢復了熱情洋溢的樣子。

meaning: 熱情的;意氣風發。
sentences: Her answer sounded ebullient during the meeting. 她在會議中的回答聽起來很熱情。
They wanted a more ebullient design for the room. 他們想要一個更熱情的房間設計。

meaning: 熱情洋溢地
sentences: She spoke ebulliently when she answered the question. 她回答問題時說得很熱情洋溢地。
He handled the small mistake ebulliently and kept working. 他很熱情洋溢地處理小錯誤，然後繼續工作。

meaning: 用於測量液體沸點的裝置。
sentences: A well-used ebulliometer rested on the table beside the other equipment. 桌子上其他設備旁邊放著一台用得很好的沸點計。
The technician reached for the ebulliometer before starting the task. 在開始任務之前，技術人員伸手去拿沸點計。

meaning: 用於測量液體沸點的儀器
sentences: A well-used ebullioscope rested on the table beside the other equipment. 桌上的其他設備旁邊放著一台用過的熱熔鏡。
The technician reached for the ebullioscope before starting the task. 在開始任務之前，技術人員伸手去拿熱熔鏡。

meaning: 屬於或關於 ebullioscopy 的。
sentences: The chemist used an ebullioscopic method to study the liquid. 化學家用沸點測定法研究這種液體。
The ebullioscopic test helped the class compare two solutions. 沸點測定測試幫助全班比較兩種溶液。

meaning: 液態沸點的測量
sentences: The lab used ebullioscopy to compare the boiling points of two liquids. 實驗室用沸點測定法比較兩種液體的沸點。
Students learned about ebullioscopy during chemistry class. 學生在化學課學到沸點測定法。

meaning: 沸騰的動作。
sentences: The ebullition of the soup fogged the kitchen window. 湯的沸騰讓廚房窗戶起霧。
The scientist watched the ebullition inside the glass flask. 科學家觀察玻璃燒瓶裡的沸騰現象。

meaning: 與沸騰有關或由沸騰引起。
sentences: Her answer sounded ebullitive during the meeting. 她在會議中的回答聽起來很與沸騰有關或由沸騰引。
They wanted a more ebullitive design for the room. 他們想要一個更與沸騰有關或由沸騰引的房間設計。

meaning: 古植物名：矮接骨木；侏儒接骨木。
sentences: The hillside was covered with ebulus in late summer. 那片山坡在夏末長滿了矮接骨木。
An old herbal book mentioned ebulus as a wild plant. 一本老草藥書提到矮接骨木是一種野生植物。

meaning: 罕見或專門的英語術語，記錄為 eburated。
sentences: The old bone looked eburated under the bright light. 那塊老骨頭在強光下看起來像象牙般硬白。
The dentist noticed an eburated area on the worn tooth. 牙醫注意到磨損牙齒上有一塊象牙化的區域。

meaning: 象牙的；似象牙的。
sentences: The statue had an eburine shine under the lamp. 那座雕像在燈下泛著象牙般的光澤。
She chose an eburine handle for the antique fan. 她替那把古董扇挑了一個象牙色澤的握柄。

meaning: 像象牙一樣堅硬而緻密。如何使用 eburnated 造句
sentences: From a distance, the shape looked eburnated. 從遠處看，這個形狀看起來像是被燒焦了。
The shell had a distinctly eburnated curve. 貝殼有明顯的燒焦曲線。

meaning: 骨退化過程，發生在關節軟骨侵蝕部位，常見於骨關節炎患者。軟骨下骨透過在侵蝕部位產生反應性的、象牙狀的緻密骨來回應增加的摩擦。
sentences: A well-used eburnation rested on the table beside the other equipment. 桌上其他設備旁邊放著一個用過的電燒器。
The technician reached for the eburnation before starting the task. 技術人員在開始任務之前伸手去拿燒焦器。

meaning: 象牙製成。
sentences: The symptom looked eburnean, so the doctor checked it again. 症狀看起來很象牙製成，所以醫生又檢查了一次。
She wrote down the eburnean sign in the health record. 她把這個象牙製成的徵象記在健康紀錄裡。

meaning: 罕用：似象牙的；象牙色的。
sentences: The statue had an eburneoid sheen under the gallery lights. 那座雕像在展廳燈光下泛著象牙般的光澤。
She chose an eburneoid fabric for the wedding dress. 她替婚紗選了一塊象牙色的布料。

meaning: 顏色類似象牙色。
sentences: From a distance, the shape looked eburneous. 從遠處看，這個形狀看起來很火熱。
The shell had a distinctly eburneous curve. 貝殼有明顯的火燒曲線。

meaning: 古語：象牙的；似象牙的；象牙色的。
sentences: The poet described her hands as eburnian in the old verse. 那位詩人在古老詩句中把她的雙手形容得如象牙般潔白。
An eburnian handle gave the antique box a refined look. 象牙色的把手讓那個古董盒看起來更精緻。

meaning: 將某些物質（例如牙髓或骨頭）轉化為象牙狀物質。
sentences: The doctor showed eburnification in the patient's joint X-ray. 醫生在病人的關節 X 光片中指出骨質象牙化。
Years of pressure caused eburnification in the damaged bone. 多年的壓力讓受損骨頭出現象牙化。

meaning: 其形態受到環境影響的有機體。
sentences: The desert ecad grew shorter leaves than the same plant by the river. 沙漠中的生態型植物比河邊同種植物長出更短的葉子。
Rain and soil changed the ecad over several seasons. 雨量和土壤在幾個季節中改變了這個環境型生物。

meaning: 不計算。
sentences: Her answer sounded ecalcarate during the meeting. 她在會議中的回答聽起來很不計算。
They wanted a more ecalcarate design for the room. 他們想要一個更不計算的房間設計。

meaning: 一種熱帶非洲藤本植物（Raphionacme utilis），屬於蘿藦科，可生產橡膠
sentences: The farmer planted ecanda beside the field. 農民在田邊種下熱帶非洲藤本植物。
The ecanda grew quickly after the rain. 熱帶非洲藤本植物在雨後長得很快。

meaning: 沒有鉸鏈－用於無法表達的腕足動物或其殼
sentences: The specimen looked ecardinal under the bright lab light. 在明亮的實驗室燈光下，標本看起來非常美麗。
An unusually ecardinal figure stood at the center of the design. 一個不同尋常的紅心人物站在設計的中心。

meaning: 不呈龍骨狀；缺一隆背。
sentences: The specimen looked ecarinate under the bright lab light. 在明亮的實驗室燈光下，標本看起來呈現蟲形。
An unusually ecarinate figure stood at the center of the design. 一個異常的橢圓形人物站在設計的中心。

meaning: 兩人制的紙牌遊戲，共32張牌，依序為K、Q、J、A、10、9、8、7。每人發5張牌，第11張為王牌。五分構成一場比賽。
sentences: He accepted the ecarte with more caution than pride. 他接受這份電子證書時更加謹慎，而不是驕傲。
The old records show how the ecarte shaped local history. 古老的記錄顯示了電子書如何塑造了當地的歷史。

meaning: 無尾；沒有尾巴或類似尾巴的附屬物。
sentences: The specimen looked ecaudate under the bright lab light. 在明亮的實驗室燈光下，標本看起來很瘦弱。
An unusually ecaudate figure stood at the center of the design. 一個異常美麗的人物站在設計的中心。

meaning: 表示單純的結果或結果。
sentences: The food was ecbatic, so she packed it for lunch. 食物還算表示單純的結果或結果，所以她把它裝成午餐。
Only the ecbatic parts of the fruit went into the salad. 只有表示單純的結果或結果的水果部分被放進沙拉裡。

meaning: 花內芽的產生。
sentences: We found ecblastesis growing near the garden wall after the rain. 雨後我們發現花園圍牆附近長出了蛻皮花。
The field guide helped us identify ecblastesis among the other plants. 實地指南幫助我們辨識了其他植物的蛻變。

meaning: 一種題外話，其中介紹一個人說他或她自己的話。
sentences: We found ecbole growing near the garden wall after the rain. 雨後我們發現花園圍牆附近長出了一種題外話，其中介紹一個人說他或她自己的話。。
The field guide helped us identify ecbole among the other plants. 現場指南幫助我們在其他植物中識別了一種題外話，其中介紹一個人說他或她自己的話。。

meaning: 造成胎兒流產或加速分娩、催產。
sentences: The symptom looked ecbolic, so the doctor checked it again. 症狀看起來很造成胎兒流產或加速分，所以醫生又檢查了一次。
She wrote down the ecbolic sign in the health record. 她把這個造成胎兒流產或加速分的徵象記在健康紀錄裡。

meaning: 19 世紀透過人工加熱孵化雞蛋的發明。
sentences: The museum displayed an eccaleobion used to hatch eggs with heat. 博物館展示了一台用熱力孵蛋的舊式孵化器。
Farmers once used an eccaleobion when hens could not sit on every egg. 以前母雞無法孵所有蛋時，農民會使用人工孵蛋器。

meaning: 罕見或專門的英語術語，記錄為 eccentrate。
sentences: Her answer sounded eccentrate during the meeting. 她在會議中的回答聽起來很eccentrate。
They wanted a more eccentrate design for the room. 他們想要一個更eccentrate的房間設計。

meaning: 古怪的、怪人
sentences: He is an eccentric billionaire who spends most of his time in a remote castle. 他是一個古怪的億萬富翁，大部分時間都待在偏遠的城堡裡。
She was known for her eccentric style of dress and unusual hobbies. 她以古怪的穿衣風格和不同尋常的愛好而聞名。

meaning: 古怪的
sentences: Her answer sounded eccentrical during the meeting. 她在會議中的回答聽起來很古怪。
They wanted a more eccentrical design for the room. 他們想要一個更古怪的房間設計。

meaning: 以一種古怪的方式。
sentences: She spoke eccentrically when she answered the question. 她回答問題時說得很古怪地。
He handled the small mistake eccentrically and kept working. 他很古怪地處理小錯誤，然後繼續工作。

meaning: 古怪或古怪的品質；任何古怪的行為。
sentences: His eccentricity made the small shop easy to remember. 他的古怪風格讓那間小店很容易被記住。
Everyone in the family accepted her harmless eccentricity. 家人都接受她那些無傷大雅的古怪行為。

meaning: 一個罕見的或專門的英語術語，記錄為 eccentring。
sentences: The mechanic fixed the eccentring wheel before the ride began. 遊樂設施開始前，技師修好了偏心的輪子。
A small eccentring motion made the machine shake. 一點偏心運動讓機器晃動起來。

meaning: 測定彈丸重心位置的儀器。
sentences: A well-used eccentrometer rested on the table beside the other equipment. 桌子上其他設備旁邊放著一個用過的偏心計。
The technician reached for the eccentrometer before starting the task. 在開始任務之前，技術人員伸手去拿偏心計。

meaning: 骨膜下軟骨瘤。
sentences: The scan showed an ecchondroma near the bone surface. 掃描顯示骨頭表面附近有骨膜下軟骨瘤。
The surgeon removed the small ecchondroma from the patient's knee. 外科醫師從病人膝蓋移除小型骨膜下軟骨瘤。

meaning: 軟骨增生。
sentences: The doctor noted ecchondrosis in the joint report. 醫生在關節報告中記錄軟骨增生。
Ecchondrosis made the bone edge look uneven. 軟骨增生讓骨頭邊緣看起來不平整。

meaning: 一個罕見的或專門的英語術語，記錄為ecchondrotome。
sentences: The surgeon chose an ecchondrotome for the cartilage procedure. 外科醫師為軟骨手術選用軟骨切除刀。
The ecchondrotome was cleaned before the operation began. 手術開始前，軟骨切除刀已清潔完畢。

meaning: 由滲出的血液組成的腫瘤樣腫脹。
sentences: The nurse measured the ecchymoma on the patient's arm. 護理師測量病人手臂上的瘀血腫塊。
An ecchymoma formed after the hard fall. 重摔之後形成一塊瘀血腫脹。

meaning: 因瘀斑產生的瘀傷。
sentences: They tried to ecchymose the problem before lunch. 他們試著在午餐前因瘀斑產生的瘀傷這個問題。
Please ecchymose the details before you send the report. 送出報告前，請先因瘀斑產生的瘀傷細節。

meaning: 由皮下出血引起的皮膚變色，尤其是遠離創傷部位或非創傷性過程（例如腫瘤）引起的皮膚變色。
sentences: The doctor checked the ecchymosis around her ankle. 醫生檢查她腳踝周圍的瘀斑。
Ecchymosis appeared two days after the injury. 受傷兩天後出現皮下瘀血。

meaning: 雅典人的公共立法議會。
sentences: Citizens gathered in the ecclesia to vote on the law. 公民聚集在公民大會中投票決定法律。
The lesson compared the ancient ecclesia with a modern assembly. 課堂把古代公民大會和現代議會做比較。

meaning: 教會的同義詞。
sentences: The service had an ecclesial feeling from start to finish. 這場禮拜從頭到尾都有教會氛圍。
She chose an ecclesial song for the Sunday gathering. 她為週日聚會選了一首教會歌曲。

meaning: 東方教會的官員，相當於西方教會的聖器管理員。
sentences: The ecclesiarch prepared the church before the morning service. 教會管理員在早禮拜前整理教堂。
People asked the ecclesiarch where to place the candles. 人們詢問教會管理員蠟燭該放在哪裡。

meaning: 由宗教統治或與宗教聯合統治的政府；教會-國家。
sentences: The small kingdom lived under an ecclesiarchy for many years. 這個小王國多年來由教會政體統治。
The book describes the rise of ecclesiarchy in the region. 那本書描述該地區教會政權的興起。

meaning: 雅典教會（公共立法議會）成員。
sentences: An ecclesiast spoke during the public assembly. 一位公民大會成員在會中發言。
The young ecclesiast voted with the other citizens. 年輕的議會成員和其他公民一起投票。

meaning: 神職人員，尤其是基督教教會的神職人員。
sentences: The ecclesiastic visited the village chapel every Sunday. 那位神職人員每週日拜訪村裡的小教堂。
A kind ecclesiastic helped the family plan the service. 一位親切的神職人員幫家人安排禮拜。

meaning: 屬於教會或與教會有關的。
sentences: The old town still has many ecclesiastical buildings. 那座老城仍保留許多教會建築。
She studied ecclesiastical history at the university. 她在大學研究教會史。

meaning: 以教會的方式
sentences: The ceremony was arranged ecclesiastically, with prayers and hymns. 這場儀式按照教會慣例安排，有禱告和聖歌。
They handled the matter ecclesiastically instead of as a business issue. 他們按照教會慣例處理這件事，而不是把它當成商業問題。

meaning: 對教會習俗和慣例有強烈的依戀。
sentences: His ecclesiasticism shaped every part of his daily life. 他對教會制度的重視影響了日常生活的每個部分。
The novel criticizes strict ecclesiasticism in the town. 這部小說批評鎮上嚴格的教會主義。

meaning: 使神職人員。
sentences: They tried to ecclesiasticize the problem before lunch. 他們試著在午餐前讓神職人員這個問題。
Please ecclesiasticize the details before you send the report. 送出報告前，請先讓神職人員細節。

meaning: 教會的研究領域。
sentences: She studied ecclesiastics before becoming a church historian. 她成為教會史學者前研究教會學。
The library has a shelf of books on ecclesiastics. 圖書館有一排關於教會學的書。

meaning: 教會事務
sentences: The committee handled ecclesiastry for the old parish. 委員會處理老教區的教會事務。
He learned ecclesiastry while assisting the priest. 他協助神父時學會處理教會事務。

meaning: 對教會有破壞性
sentences: The ceremony felt ecclesioclastic and quiet. 這場儀式感覺很對教會有破壞性又安靜。
They kept the ecclesioclastic music soft during the service. 禮拜時，他們讓對教會有破壞性的音樂保持柔和。

meaning: 教會建築與教會器物的研究；亦可指對教會的描述或記述
sentences: She studied ecclesiography to better understand how medieval churches were designed. 她研究教會建築與教會器物學，以更了解中世紀教堂是如何設計的。
The book combines local history with detailed ecclesiography of the old cathedral. 這本書結合地方史，並細緻記述那座古老大教堂的教會建築與陳設。

meaning: 一個對教會作為一個機構而不是其所服務的宗教表現出過度奉獻的人。
sentences: The reformer called him an ecclesiolater because he valued the institution too much. 改革者稱他為教會崇拜者，因為他過度重視教會機構。
An ecclesiolater may defend the church system before the faith itself. 教會崇拜者可能會把教會制度看得比信仰本身更重要。

meaning: 過度奉獻於教會作為一個機構，而不是其所服務的宗教。
sentences: The essay warns against ecclesiolatry in religious life. 這篇文章提醒宗教生活中不要過度崇拜教會制度。
Ecclesiolatry made the leaders ignore the needs of ordinary believers. 對教會制度的過度崇拜讓領袖忽視一般信徒的需要。

meaning: 教會學的同義詞。
sentences: The note sounded ecclesiologic, so the editor rewrote it. 這段文字聽起來很教會學，所以編輯把它改寫了。
She noticed an ecclesiologic tone in the short message. 她注意到短訊裡有一種教會學的語氣。

meaning: 屬於或關於教會學的。
sentences: His essay took an ecclesiological view of the local church. 他的文章從教會學角度看地方教會。
The professor raised an ecclesiological question during the lecture. 教授在演講中提出一個教會學問題。

meaning: 就教會學而言。
sentences: Ecclesiologically, the decision changed the role of the church council. 就教會學而言，這項決定改變了教會議會的角色。
She examined the ceremony ecclesiologically, not only historically. 她從教會學角度，而不只是歷史角度，檢視這個儀式。

meaning: 教會學專家。
sentences: The ecclesiologist studied how the local church was organized. 教會學家研究地方教會如何組織。
An ecclesiologist spoke at the theology conference. 一位教會學家在神學會議上發言。

meaning: 神學的一個分支，涉及教會的教義、角色等。
sentences: Ecclesiology asks what the church is and what it should do. 教會學探問教會是什麼以及應該做什麼。
She wrote her thesis on ecclesiology. 她的論文主題是教會學。

meaning: 對教堂的恐懼
sentences: His ecclesiophobia made it hard for him to enter the chapel. 他的教堂恐懼症讓他很難走進小教堂。
The counselor helped her talk about her ecclesiophobia. 諮商師幫她談論對教堂的恐懼。

meaning: 溫和的瀉藥。
sentences: The doctor gave him an eccoprotic after the surgery. 手術後，醫生給他溫和瀉藥。
An eccoprotic can help when constipation is mild. 輕微便秘時，溫和瀉藥可能有幫助。

meaning: 表現出瀉藥的特性
sentences: The pharmacist labeled the medicine eccoproticophoric. 藥師把這種藥標示為具有瀉藥性質。
An eccoproticophoric herb was added to the old remedy. 這個古方加入了一種有瀉藥作用的草藥。

meaning: 分泌和小汗腺的科學研究。
sentences: The researcher focused on eccrinology and sweat gland disorders. 研究人員專注於汗腺學和汗腺疾病。
Eccrinology helped explain why the patient sweated too much. 汗腺學幫助解釋病人為何流汗過多。

meaning: 清除廢物。
sentences: The body uses eccrisis to remove waste. 身體透過排泄清除廢物。
The doctor asked whether eccrisis had returned to normal. 醫生詢問排泄是否恢復正常。

meaning: 任何促進放電的藥物。
sentences: The old prescription included an eccritic to promote discharge. 舊處方中包含促進排出的藥物。
The physician chose an eccritic for the blocked gland. 醫師為阻塞的腺體選用促排藥。

meaning: 古希臘戲劇中使用的一種輪式裝置，可以將其展開以允許觀看畫面。
sentences: A well-used eccyclema rested on the table beside the other equipment. 桌子上其他設備旁邊放著一個用過的濕紙巾。
The technician reached for the eccyclema before starting the task. 技術人員在開始任務之前伸手去抓濕疹。

meaning: 子宮外孕的同義詞。
sentences: The ultrasound confirmed eccyesis outside the uterus. 超音波確認子宮外孕。
Eccyesis can become dangerous without quick treatment. 子宮外孕若不及時治療可能變得危險。

meaning: 源自其發生區域之外。
sentences: Her answer sounded ecdemic during the meeting. 她在會議中的回答聽起來很源自其發生區域之外。
They wanted a more ecdemic design for the room. 他們想要一個更源自其發生區域之外的房間設計。

meaning: 一種四方礦物，含有砷、氯、鉛和氧。
sentences: The mineral case held a small piece of ecdemite. 礦物展示櫃裡放著一小塊 ecdemite。
Ecdemite formed in clay nodules with lead and arsenic. ecdemite 形成於含鉛和砷的黏土結核中。

meaning: 疑似非標準或極罕見拼寫；正式寫作前應再查證。
sentences: I found the form ecderon in a handwritten note, but I could not confirm it in a standard dictionary. 我在手寫筆記裡看到這個拼法，但無法在標準字典中確認它。
Before using ecderon in a report, we should verify whether it is a misspelling or a highly rare variant. 在報告中使用這個拼法之前，我們應先確認它是拼錯字還是極罕見的變體。

meaning: 疑似非標準或極罕見拼寫；正式寫作前應再查證。
sentences: I found the word ecderonic in an old handwritten note, but I could not confirm its meaning. 我在一張老手寫筆記裡看到這個拼寫，但還無法確認它的意思。
Before using ecderonic in a report, we should check whether it is a misspelling or a variant form. 在報告裡使用這個拼寫前，我們應先查清楚它是不是拼錯或異體形式。

meaning: 脫掉衣服作為娛樂形式的色情舞者；脫衣舞孃。
sentences: The ecdysiast performed under bright stage lights. 脫衣舞者在明亮的舞台燈下表演。
A famous ecdysiast drew crowds to the old theater. 一位知名脫衣舞者吸引觀眾到老劇院。

meaning: 昆蟲和甲殼類動物的外骨骼脫落。
sentences: Researchers observed a ecdysis near the edge of the field at dawn. 研究人員在黎明時分在田野邊緣附近觀察到蛻皮現象。
The illustration showed the ecdysis in its natural setting. 此插圖顯示了自然環境下的蛻皮過程。

meaning: 與排泄有關。
sentences: The doctor recorded an ecesic problem in the patient's chart. 醫生在病歷上記錄了排泄相關問題。
The nurse asked about ecesic symptoms after the surgery. 護理師詢問手術後是否有排泄相關症狀。

meaning: 在先前貧瘠或由於某些災難而變得貧瘠的棲息地中成功建立植物或動物物種的過程。
sentences: We found ecesis growing near the shaded path after the rain. 雨後，我們在陰涼的小路附近發現了在先前貧瘠或由於某些災難而變得貧瘠的棲息地中成功建立植物或動物物種的過程。。
The field guide helped us identify ecesis among the other plants. 現場指南幫助我們識別了其他植物的排泄物。

meaning: 一種天然存在於古柯葉中的有機化學物質和托烷生物鹼。
sentences: The chemist detected ecgonine in the plant extract. 化學家在植物萃取物中檢測到芽子鹼。
Ecgonine is related to compounds found in coca leaves. 芽子鹼與古柯葉中的化合物有關。

meaning: 增加，擴大
sentences: The builder planned to eche the storage room next spring. 建築工人計畫明年春天擴建儲藏室。
They decided to eche the garden by moving the fence. 他們決定移動圍籬來擴大花園。

meaning: 疑似非標準或極罕見拼寫；正式寫作前應再查證。
sentences: I saw the word echea in a scanned document, but the context was not clear enough to define it. 我在掃描文件中看到這個拼寫，但前後文不足以判定它的意思。
Please verify whether echea is a correct spelling before you include it in formal writing. 在正式寫作中使用這個拼寫前，請先確認它是否為正確拼法。

meaning: 反射光柵，由拋光金屬板上刻出平行的 V 形凹槽製成，光線從連續凹槽的相應面反射
sentences: The physics lab used an echelette to reflect light at set angles. 物理實驗室用小階梯光柵以固定角度反射光線。
A scratch on the echelette changed the pattern of the light. 小階梯光柵上的刮痕改變了光的圖樣。

meaning: 組織、職業或社會中的層級或層級。
sentences: He accepted the echelon with more caution than pride. 他接受這個梯隊時更加謹慎，而不是驕傲。
The old records show how the echelon shaped local history. 古老的記錄顯示了梯隊如何塑造了當地的歷史。

meaning: 梯隊排列。
sentences: The soldiers practiced echelonment on the open field. 士兵在空地上練習梯隊排列。
Good echelonment helped the trucks move safely through the pass. 良好的梯隊排列幫助卡車安全通過山口。

meaning: 鮣科魚類；吸盤魚科魚類
sentences: The remora is an echeneidid fish known for attaching itself to sharks. 鮣魚是一種鮣科魚類，以會吸附在鯊魚身上而聞名。
Researchers found a small echeneidid clinging to the side of the turtle. 研究人員發現一條小型鮣科魚黏附在那隻海龜的側邊。

meaning: 似鮣科魚的動物；鮣科的
sentences: The fossil shows an echeneidoid body shape with a flattened head. 這塊化石呈現出類似鮣科魚的體型，頭部較為扁平。
Some early notes described the specimen as echeneidoid because of its suction-disk structure. 一些早期筆記因為它有吸盤狀構造，而把這個標本描述成鮣科樣的。

meaning: 鱟科中小型有刺單孔目動物的任何一種，現存的四種是在澳洲和新幾內亞南部發現的。
sentences: The echidna curled up when it heard footsteps. 針鼴聽到腳步聲時縮成一團。
Children saw an echidna in the wildlife park. 孩子們在野生動物園看到一隻針鼴。

meaning: 與海膽有關
sentences: Her answer sounded echinal during the meeting. 她在會議中的回答聽起來很與海膽有關。
They wanted a more echinal design for the room. 他們想要一個更與海膽有關的房間設計。

meaning: 多刺的；剛毛的
sentences: Her answer sounded echinate during the meeting. 她在會議中的回答聽起來很多刺。
They wanted a more echinate design for the room. 他們想要一個更多刺的房間設計。

meaning: 海膽的古老形式。
sentences: The fossil collector found an echinid in the limestone. 化石收藏家在石灰岩裡發現海膽化石。
An echinid shell lay half buried in the sand. 一個海膽殼半埋在沙裡。

meaning: 屬於或來自於針尖石。
sentences: The lab report described the sample as echinital. 實驗報告把樣本描述為或來自於針尖石。
Students compared the echinital result with yesterday's data. 學生把或來自於針尖石結果和昨天的資料比較。

meaning: 海膽化石。
sentences: The museum displayed an echinite beside other sea fossils. 博物館把海膽化石和其他海洋化石放在一起展示。
She cleaned the echinite with a soft brush. 她用軟刷清理海膽化石。

meaning: 在海膽中發現的通常為紅色的生物色素。
sentences: The scientist studied echinochrome in sea urchin tissue. 科學家研究海膽組織中的棘色素。
Echinochrome gave the sample a reddish color. 棘色素讓樣本呈現微紅色。

meaning: 人類以及許多家畜和野生動物的寄生蟲，被認為是細粒棘球絛蟲的幼蟲階段，在各種器官中形成複合包囊或腫瘤（稱為包蟲包囊），特別是在肝臟和肺部。
sentences: Researchers observed a echinococcus near the edge of the field at dawn. 研究人員在黎明時分在田地邊緣附近觀察到了一種棘球絛蟲。
The illustration showed the echinococcus in its natural setting. 插圖顯示了自然環境中的棘球絛蟲。

meaning: 棘皮動物門的一種動物，包括徑向對稱、有刺皮膚的海洋動物，包括海星、海膽、海參、海百合和沙錢。
sentences: Researchers observed a echinoderm near the edge of the field at dawn. 研究人員在黎明時分在田野邊緣附近觀察到了一隻棘皮動物。
The illustration showed the echinoderm in its natural setting. 插圖展示了自然環境中的棘皮動物。

meaning: 與棘皮動物有關或屬於棘皮動物。
sentences: The old box looked echinodermal in the afternoon light. 老盒子在午後光線下看起來很與棘皮動物有關或屬於。
She chose an echinodermal finish for the small table. 她為小桌子選了與棘皮動物有關或屬於的表面處理。

meaning: 與棘皮動物有關；棘皮動物。
sentences: The old box looked echinodermatous in the afternoon light. 老盒子在午後光線下看起來很與棘皮動物有關。
She chose an echinodermatous finish for the small table. 她為小桌子選了與棘皮動物有關的表面處理。

meaning: 棘皮動物的同義詞。
sentences: The note sounded echinodermic, so the editor rewrote it. 這段文字聽起來很棘皮動物，所以編輯把它改寫了。
She noticed an echinodermic tone in the short message. 她注意到短訊裡有一種棘皮動物的語氣。

meaning: 形似海膽。
sentences: From a distance, the shape looked echinoid. 從遠處看，形狀看起來像海膽。
The shell had a distinctly echinoid curve. 貝殼有明顯的海膽曲線。

meaning: 研究機械學的人。
sentences: The echinologist studied sea urchins along the coast. 棘皮動物學家研究海岸邊的海膽。
An echinologist explained the starfish skeleton to the class. 棘皮動物學家向全班解釋海星骨骼。

meaning: 棘皮動物的科學研究。
sentences: Echinology covers animals such as sea stars and sea urchins. 棘皮動物學涵蓋海星和海膽等動物。
She chose echinology because she loved tide pools. 她選擇棘皮動物學，因為她喜歡潮池。

meaning: 一種結晶生物鹼 C10H9NO，源自薊種子中的喹啉，具有與馬錢子鹼和馬錢子鹼類似的生理作用
sentences: A well-used echinopsine rested on the table beside the other equipment. 桌子上其他設備旁邊放著一把用過的刺頭。
The technician reached for the echinopsine before starting the task. 技術人員在開始任務之前伸手去拿刺頭。

meaning: 棘口目任何扁蟲
sentences: Researchers observed a echinostome near the edge of the field at dawn. 黎明時分，研究人員在田野邊緣附近觀察到了一隻棘口動物。
The illustration showed the echinostome in its natural setting. 插圖展示了自然環境中的棘口動物。

meaning: 棘口線蟲寄生蟲感染
sentences: The clinic treated a case of echinostomiasis after the trip. 旅行後，診所治療了一起棘口吸蟲感染。
Echinostomiasis can spread through unsafe freshwater food. 棘口吸蟲感染可能透過不安全的淡水食物傳播。

meaning: 有小刺或類似的突出物
sentences: Her answer sounded echinulate during the meeting. 她在會議中的回答聽起來很有小刺或類似的突出物。
They wanted a more echinulate design for the room. 他們想要一個更有小刺或類似的突出物的房間設計。

meaning: 罕見或專門的英語術語，記錄為 echinulated。
sentences: Her answer sounded echinulated during the meeting. 她在會議中的回答聽起來很echinulate。
They wanted a more echinulated design for the room. 他們想要一個更echinulate的房間設計。

meaning: 小刺的集合
sentences: The leaf had fine echinulation along its edge. 那片葉子邊緣有細小刺狀突起。
Under the lens, echinulation covered the tiny shell. 透過放大鏡，小殼上布滿細刺。

meaning: 類似小刺。
sentences: From a distance, the shape looked echinuliform. 從遠處看，這個形狀看起來像棘刺狀。
The shell had a distinctly echinuliform curve. 貝殼有明顯的棘狀曲線。

meaning: 一隻海膽。
sentences: The child found an echinus shell on the beach. 孩子在海灘上找到一個海膽殼。
An echinus moved slowly across the aquarium floor. 一隻海膽在水族箱底部慢慢移動。

meaning: 迪泰因
sentences: The lab tested echitamine from the tree bark. 實驗室測試樹皮中的 echitamine。
Echitamine appeared in the chemical analysis of the plant. echitamine 出現在植物的化學分析中。

meaning: 鯽浦綱的幾種匙蟲之一。
sentences: Researchers observed a echiurid near the edge of the field at dawn. 黎明時分，研究人員在田野邊緣附近觀察到了一種貉科動物。
The illustration showed the echiurid in its natural setting. 插圖展示了自然環境下的薺菜。

meaning: 一種 Echiuroidea 目蠕蟲。
sentences: Researchers observed a echiuroid near the edge of the field at dawn. 黎明時分，研究人員在田野邊緣附近觀察到了一顆魚。
The illustration showed the echiuroid in its natural setting. 插圖展示了自然環境中的針狀體。

meaning: 迴音
sentences: The echo came up during a quiet conversation at home. 在家裡一場安靜的談話中，大家提到了迴音。
She learned about the echo while helping a friend. 她在幫朋友時了解了迴音。

meaning: 一個人，或那個，迴響或重複某事的人。
sentences: We found echoer growing near the garden wall after the rain. 雨後我們發現花園圍牆附近有迴音。
The field guide helped us identify echoer among the other plants. 現場指南幫助我們識別其他植物中的迴聲植物。

meaning: 屬於或關於迴聲的
sentences: Her answer sounded echoic during the meeting. 她在會議中的回答聽起來很迴聲相關。
They wanted a more echoic design for the room. 他們想要一個更迴聲相關的房間設計。

meaning: 以一種迴響的方式。
sentences: She spoke echoingly when she answered the question. 她回答問題時說得很迴響地。
He handled the small mistake echoingly and kept working. 他很迴響地處理小錯誤，然後繼續工作。

meaning: 透過模仿環境中的聲音來創造單字或語言的實踐。
sentences: Echoism helps create words that sound like real noises. 擬聲法有助於創造聽起來像真實聲音的詞。
The poem used echoism to imitate rain on the roof. 這首詩用擬聲法模仿雨打屋頂的聲音。

meaning: 一個像迴音一樣重複的人；無意識的模仿者
sentences: We found echoist growing near the stream bank after the rain. 雨後我們發現河岸附近出現了迴音。
The field guide helped us identify echoist among the other plants. 現場指南幫助我們識別了其他植物中的迴聲植物。

meaning: 創造擬聲詞或發聲（即模仿其所代表的聲音的詞）。
sentences: They tried to echoize the problem before lunch. 他們試著在午餐前創造擬聲詞或發聲（即這個問題。
Please echoize the details before you send the report. 送出報告前，請先創造擬聲詞或發聲（即細節。

meaning: 不自覺地重複別人所說的單字或片語；立即或延遲。
sentences: The child showed echolalia by repeating the teacher's last words. 那孩子重複老師最後幾個字，表現出仿語現象。
The doctor asked when the echolalia usually happened. 醫生詢問仿語通常在什麼時候出現。

meaning: 屬於或關於Echollia的。
sentences: Her answer sounded echolalic during the meeting. 她在會議中的回答聽起來很Echollia相關。
They wanted a more echolalic design for the room. 他們想要一個更Echollia相關的房間設計。

meaning: 無迴聲。
sentences: The specimen looked echoless under the bright lab light. 在明亮的實驗室燈光下，標本看起來沒有迴音。
An unusually echoless figure stood at the center of the design. 一個異常無聲的人物站在設計的中心。

meaning: 用於測量聲音持續時間並確定其間隔關係的刻度尺。
sentences: A well-used echometer rested on the table beside the other equipment. 桌子上其他設備旁邊放著一台用過的迴聲計。
The technician reached for the echometer before starting the task. 在開始任務之前，技術人員伸手拿回波計。

meaning: 患有或与之相关。
sentences: Her answer sounded echopractic during the meeting. 她在會議中的回答聽起來很患有或与之相关。
They wanted a more echopractic design for the room. 他們想要一個更患有或与之相关的房間設計。

meaning: 不自覺地重複或模仿觀察到的他人的動作。
sentences: The patient showed echopraxia by copying the nurse's hand movement. 病人模仿護理師的手部動作，表現出模仿動作症。
Echopraxia made him repeat gestures without meaning to. 模仿動作症讓他不由自主地重複別人的手勢。

meaning: 一個罕見的或專門的英語術語，記錄為 echowise。
sentences: The singer repeated the last line echowise in the empty hall. 歌手在空蕩大廳裡像回聲般重複最後一句。
The children answered echowise from the other side of the tunnel. 孩子們從隧道另一端像回聲一樣回答。

meaning: 不是纖毛蟲。
sentences: Her answer sounded eciliate during the meeting. 她在會議中的回答聽起來很不是纖毛蟲。
They wanted a more eciliate design for the room. 他們想要一個更不是纖毛蟲的房間設計。

meaning: 植物的：在棲息地定居。
sentences: The biologist found ecize near the wet soil. 生物學家在濕土附近發現植物的：在棲息地定居。
ecize grew better after several days of rain. 下了幾天雨後，植物的：在棲息地定居長得更好。

meaning: 一種舊的容量衡量標準。
sentences: The old recipe measured grain by the ecklein. 那份舊食譜用一種古老容量單位量穀物。
The merchant wrote one ecklein of flour on the faded bill. 商人在褪色帳單上寫下一份舊容量單位的麵粉。

meaning: 通常是巧克力糖霜的長方形糕點，裡面填滿生奶油或奶凍
sentences: She bought a chocolate eclair from the bakery. 她從麵包店買了一個巧克力閃電泡芙。
The eclair was filled with cold vanilla cream. 那個閃電泡芙裡填滿冰涼的香草奶油。

meaning: 一種妊娠併發症，其特徵是高血壓引起的癲癇發作和昏迷。
sentences: The doctor treated eclampsia as an emergency. 醫生把子癇視為緊急狀況處理。
Eclampsia can cause seizures during pregnancy. 子癇可能在懷孕期間引發癲癇發作。

meaning: 屬於或關於子癇的。
sentences: Her answer sounded eclamptic during the meeting. 她在會議中的回答聽起來很子癇相關。
They wanted a more eclamptic design for the room. 他們想要一個更子癇相關的房間設計。

meaning: 輝煌；喝采；耀眼風采
sentences: Her performance won great eclat at the festival. 她的表演在音樂節上贏得大量喝采。
The restaurant opened with style and eclat. 那家餐廳開幕時氣派十足、風采耀眼。

meaning: 選擇各種學說、方法或風格中最好的組合。
sentences: The cafe plays an eclectic mix of jazz and pop. 這間咖啡店播放爵士和流行樂混合的多元曲風。
Her room has an eclectic style with old and new furniture. 她的房間把新舊家具混在一起，很有折衷風格。

meaning: 一個罕見的或專門的英語術語，被記錄為折衷主義。
sentences: Her answer sounded eclectical during the meeting. 她在會議中的回答聽起來很折衷主義。
They wanted a more eclectical design for the room. 他們想要一個更折衷主義的房間設計。

meaning: 以一種不拘一格的方式。
sentences: She spoke eclectically when she answered the question. 她回答問題時說得很不拘一格地。
He handled the small mistake eclectically and kept working. 他很不拘一格地處理小錯誤，然後繼續工作。

meaning: 一種借鏡多種理論的思考方法。
sentences: Her apartment showed eclecticism with old chairs and modern lamps. 她的公寓用舊椅子和現代燈具展現折衷風格。
The course encouraged eclecticism in solving design problems. 這門課鼓勵用折衷方法解決設計問題。

meaning: 使之不拘一格或變化多端。
sentences: They tried to eclecticize the problem before lunch. 他們試著在午餐前讓之不拘一格或變化多這個問題。
Please eclecticize the details before you send the report. 送出報告前，請先讓之不拘一格或變化多細節。

meaning: 一個罕見的或專門的英語術語，記錄為折衷主義。
sentences: His eclectism mixed ideas from art, science, and history. 他的折衷主義混合了藝術、科學和歷史的想法。
Eclectism shaped the cafe's unusual interior. 折衷風格塑造了那家咖啡館獨特的室內設計。

meaning: 一個罕見的或專門的英語術語，記錄為折中主義。
sentences: The eclectist borrowed methods from several schools of thought. 折衷派學者借用多個思想流派的方法。
As an eclectist, she never followed only one theory. 身為折衷派，她從不只遵循一種理論。

meaning: 由油與糖漿混合製成的藥物；林克圖斯。
sentences: The old doctor gave the child an eclegm for the cough. 老醫生給孩子一種糖漿藥來止咳。
The eclegm tasted sweet because it contained syrup. 這種含服藥因為有糖漿，所以味道很甜。

meaning: 吸食甘草糖漿可緩解咳嗽
sentences: Grandma used eclegma to soothe a dry cough. 奶奶用甘草糖漿藥舒緩乾咳。
The bottle of eclegma sat beside the bed. 那瓶糖漿藥放在床邊。

meaning: 能夠黯然失色。
sentences: Her answer sounded eclipsable during the meeting. 她在會議中的回答聽起來很可黯然失色。
They wanted a more eclipsable design for the room. 他們想要一個更可黯然失色的房間設計。

meaning: 一種測量日食的裝置。
sentences: A well-used eclipsareon rested on the table beside the other equipment. 桌上其他設備旁邊放著一個用過的日食儀。
The technician reached for the eclipsareon before starting the task. 在開始任務之前，技術人員伸手去拿日食鏡。

meaning: 黯然失色。
sentences: The singer's sudden fame caused the eclipsation of the older star. 那位歌手突然走紅，讓老牌明星黯然失色。
Clouds brought the eclipsation of the moon. 雲層讓月亮黯淡下來。

meaning: 蝕、日蝕、月蝕
sentences: Thousands of people gathered to watch the total solar eclipse yesterday. 數千人聚集在一起觀看昨天的日全蝕。
The young musician's success threatened to eclipse his older brother's career. 那位年輕音樂家的成功威脅要使他哥哥的事業失色。

meaning: 黯然失色的人或物。
sentences: The young runner became an eclipser of last year's champion. 那位年輕跑者成了讓去年冠軍失色的人。
A bright new product was the eclipser of the old model. 一項亮眼新產品讓舊款相形失色。

meaning: 省略完全表達片語意義所需的單字。
sentences: The teacher pointed out eclipsis in the Latin phrase. 老師指出拉丁片語中的省略現象。
Eclipsis made the sentence shorter but harder to read. 省略讓句子變短，但也更難讀。

meaning: 這個大圓所在的平面。
sentences: The planets appear to move near the ecliptic in the night sky. 行星在夜空中看起來沿著黃道附近移動。
The astronomy app marked the ecliptic with a thin yellow line. 天文 app 用一條細黃線標出黃道。

meaning: 屬於或關於日食的。
sentences: The chart showed the ecliptical path of the sun. 圖表顯示太陽的黃道路徑。
An ecliptical calculation helped predict the eclipse. 黃道相關計算幫助預測日食。

meaning: 一個罕見的或專門的英語術語，記錄為黃道。
sentences: The planets were arranged ecliptically across the chart. 行星在圖表上沿黃道排列。
The model displayed the moon's motion ecliptically. 這個模型以黃道方式呈現月球運動。

meaning: 一種粗粒變質岩，是輝石、石英和長石的混合物，內含紅色石榴石。
sentences: The geologist found eclogite in the mountain sample. 地質學家在山區樣本中發現榴輝岩。
A piece of eclogite sat in the museum display case. 一塊榴輝岩放在博物館展示櫃裡。

meaning: 一首田園詩​​，常採用牧羊人的獨白或牧羊人之間的對話形式。
sentences: The poet wrote an eclogue about two shepherds in spring. 詩人寫了一首關於兩位牧羊人在春天的田園詩。
Students read an eclogue filled with quiet country scenes. 學生讀了一首充滿寧靜鄉村景色的田園詩。

meaning: 昆蟲從蛹殼中羽化，或幼蟲從卵中羽化。
sentences: Researchers observed a eclosion near the edge of the field at dawn. 研究人員在黎明時分在田野邊緣附近觀察到羽化現象。
The illustration showed the eclosion in its natural setting. 插圖展示了自然環境下的羽化。

meaning: 一種失憶症，患者可以回憶起較早的事件，但無法回憶起最近的事件。
sentences: Ecmnesia made him remember childhood clearly but forget yesterday. 舊事記憶症讓他清楚記得童年，卻忘了昨天。
The doctor tested the patient for ecmnesia. 醫生檢查病人是否有舊事記憶症。

meaning: 疑似非標準或極罕見拼寫；正式寫作前應再查證。
sentences: I found the word ecoid in an old note, but I still need to confirm the spelling. 我在一份舊筆記裡看到這個字，但仍需要確認拼寫。
Before using ecoid in a report, she checked whether it was a valid English word. 她在報告裡使用這個字之前，先查證它是不是有效的英文詞。

meaning: （常指藝術、文學等的）流派；學派
sentences: The painter studied with the Paris ecole in his early years. 那位畫家早年師從巴黎的一個藝術流派。
Her work does not fit neatly into any single ecole. 她的作品很難被明確歸入任何單一學派。

meaning: 與生態學有關，生物體及其環境的相互關係。
sentences: Her answer sounded ecologic during the meeting. 她在會議中的回答聽起來很與生態學有關。
They wanted a more ecologic design for the room. 他們想要一個更與生態學有關的房間設計。

meaning: 生態的、生態學的
sentences: The project aims to study the ecological impact of the new highway system. 該專案旨在研究新高速公路系統對生態的影響。
The organization promotes ecological awareness and environmental protection. 該組織推廣生態意識和環境保護。

meaning: 以生態的方式。
sentences: She spoke ecologically when she answered the question. 她回答問題時說得很生態地。
He handled the small mistake ecologically and kept working. 他很生態地處理小錯誤，然後繼續工作。

meaning: 生態學學者。
sentences: The ecologist counted frogs near the wetland. 生態學家在濕地附近計算青蛙數量。
An ecologist warned that the forest was losing insects. 一位生態學家警告森林裡的昆蟲正在減少。

meaning: 生態學、生態
sentences: She decided to study ecology because she is passionate about environmental protection. 她決定學習生態學，因為她對環境保護充滿熱情。
The destruction of the rainforest has a devastating impact on the local ecology. 熱帶雨林的破壞對當地生態產生了毀滅性的影響。

meaning: 機動車輛中指示油耗的儀表。
sentences: A well-used econometer rested on the table beside the other equipment. 桌子上其他設備旁邊放著一台用得很好的經濟計。
The technician reached for the econometer before starting the task. 在開始任務之前，技術人員伸手去拿經濟計。

meaning: 結合經濟學和數學；與經濟衡量有關
sentences: The team built an econometric model to study wages. 團隊建立計量經濟模型來研究薪資。
Her econometric analysis compared prices across five cities. 她的計量經濟分析比較五個城市的價格。

meaning: 研究、使用或從事計量經濟學工作的人。
sentences: The econometrician studied how rent changed after the new policy. 計量經濟學家研究新政策後租金如何變化。
An econometrician built a model from years of sales data. 計量經濟學家用多年銷售資料建立模型。

meaning: 將統計方法應用於經濟理論和關係的實證研究的經濟學分支。
sentences: He used econometrics to study the housing market. 他用計量經濟學研究房市。
Econometrics helped the students test their economic theory. 計量經濟學幫助學生檢驗他們的經濟理論。

meaning: 經濟的
sentences: The government is taking steps to stimulate economic growth and reduce unemployment. 政府正採取措施刺激經濟增長並減少失業。
The country's economic situation is expected to improve in the coming months. 該國的經濟狀況預計將在未來幾個月內有所改善。

meaning: 經濟
sentences: Electric vehicles are much more economical to operate than traditional ones. 電動車的運作成本比傳統汽車經濟（節省）得多。
She decided to buy a more economical car to save money on gasoline. 她決定買一輛更經濟實惠的車，以節省汽油錢。

meaning: 以經濟的方式；不浪費；不奢侈。
sentences: If someone acts economically, they do so in a way that is in an economical manner; not wastefully; not extravagantly. 如果某人採取經濟行為，他們就會以經濟的方式這樣做；不浪費；並不奢侈。
The speaker responded economically during the discussion. 發言者在討論中做出了經濟的回應。

meaning: 經濟學
sentences: He decided to study international economics at a leading university in Taipei. 他決定在台北的一所頂尖大學攻讀國際經濟學。
The professor gave a fascinating lecture on the basic principles of economics. 教授做了一場關於經濟學基本原理的精彩講座。

meaning: 相信經濟原因或因素對所有其他原因或因素具有主導作用
sentences: The critic said economism ignored culture and family life. 批評者說經濟決定論忽略了文化和家庭生活。
Economism reduced every problem to money. 經濟決定論把每個問題都簡化成金錢問題。

meaning: 經濟學家
sentences: The leading economist predicted a significant drop in the global inflation rate. 這位頂尖經濟學家預測全球通膨率將大幅下降。
He works as a senior research economist for an international financial firm. 他在一家國際金融公司擔任高級研究經濟學家。

meaning: 使用資源達到最佳效果的行為或做法。
sentences: The company used economization to reduce wasted electricity. 公司透過節約措施減少電力浪費。
Careful economization helped the family save money. 謹慎節省幫助那個家庭存下錢。

meaning: 實施節約（節約或適度使用物品，避免浪費或鋪張浪費）。
sentences: They tried to economize the problem before lunch. 他們試著在午餐前實施節約（節約或適度這個問題。
Please economize the details before you send the report. 送出報告前，請先實施節約（節約或適度細節。

meaning: 一個避免浪費的人
sentences: The economizer repaired old furniture instead of buying new pieces. 節儉的人修理舊家具，而不是買新的。
A good economizer plans meals before shopping. 善於節省的人會在購物前規劃餐點。

meaning: 經濟
sentences: The global economy has faced many challenges in the recent few years. 全球經濟在最近幾年面臨了許多挑戰。
Using public transport is a great way to save money and support the economy. 使用大眾運輸是省錢並支持經濟的一種好方法。

meaning: 特定棲息地中基因型產生的表現型範圍
sentences: The wetland produced a different ecophene in the same plant species. 同一種植物在濕地中呈現不同的生態表型。
Researchers compared each ecophene across several habitats. 研究人員比較不同棲地中的各種生態表型。

meaning: 害怕一個人的家。
sentences: His ecophobia made staying home feel frightening. 他的居家恐懼症讓待在家變得可怕。
The therapist helped her face her ecophobia slowly. 治療師幫她慢慢面對居家恐懼。

meaning: 非皮質；不包裹在皮質。
sentences: She used soft paper to ecorticate the small gift. 她用柔軟的紙把小禮物包起來。
Fog seemed to ecorticate the quiet street at night. 夜裡的霧像是把安靜的街道包住。

meaning: 生態型
sentences: The botanist treated the mountain plants as a separate ecospecies. 植物學家把山區植物視為不同的生態種。
An ecospecies may look similar but live in a different habitat. 生態種外表可能相似，但生活在不同棲地。

meaning: 與生態物種有關。
sentences: The study focused on ecospecific differences between the two grasses. 研究聚焦於兩種草之間的生態種差異。
Ecospecific traits helped the plant survive in dry soil. 生態種特徵幫助植物在乾土中存活。

meaning: 一個罕見的或專門的英語術語，記錄為生態專用。
sentences: The plants were grouped ecospecifically before the field test. 田野測試前，植物依生態種分組。
The researcher compared the samples ecospecifically. 研究人員依生態種比較樣本。

meaning: 沒有肋骨或神經。
sentences: The symptom looked ecostate, so the doctor checked it again. 症狀看起來很沒有肋骨或神經，所以醫生又檢查了一次。
She wrote down the ecostate sign in the health record. 她把這個沒有肋骨或神經的徵象記在健康紀錄裡。

meaning: 生態系統
sentences: The coral reef is a complex and fragile ecosystem that supports many marine species. 珊瑚礁是一個複雜且脆弱的生態系統，支撐著許多海洋物種。
Human activity can easily disrupt the delicate balance of a natural ecosystem. 人類活動很容易破壞自然生態系統的微妙平衡。

meaning: 與生態交錯帶有關。
sentences: Her answer sounded ecotonal during the meeting. 她在會議中的回答聽起來很與生態交錯帶有關。
They wanted a more ecotonal design for the room. 他們想要一個更與生態交錯帶有關的房間設計。

meaning: 兩個相鄰生態群落（生態系）之間的過渡區域。
sentences: Many birds gather in the ecotone between the forest and the grassland. 許多鳥聚集在森林和草原之間的生態交錯帶。
The riverbank formed a rich ecotone for insects and plants. 河岸形成適合昆蟲和植物的豐富生態交錯帶。

meaning: 適應特定環境的表型。
sentences: This ecotype survives better in salty soil. 這種生態型在鹽分高的土壤中更容易存活。
The mountain ecotype blooms later than the valley plants. 山地生態型比山谷植物更晚開花。

meaning: 屬於或關於生態型的
sentences: The ecotypic plants grew better in salty soil. 這些生態型植物在鹽分高的土壤中長得更好。
Researchers recorded ecotypic variation in the coastal grass. 研究人員記錄海岸草的生態型變異。

meaning: 作為或與生態型有關。
sentences: The two plant groups differed ecotypically in dry weather. 乾燥天氣下，兩組植物在生態型上有所不同。
The seedlings responded ecotypically to the local soil. 幼苗依其生態型對當地土壤產生反應。

meaning: 以可聽聲調說出的服務部分。
sentences: The priest marked the ecphonesis in the service book. 神父在禮拜書中標出要高聲誦讀的部分。
The choir waited for the ecphonesis before responding. 唱詩班等到高聲誦讀段落後才回應。

meaning: 能夠透過回春過程檢索。
sentences: Her answer sounded ecphorable during the meeting. 她在會議中的回答聽起來很可透過回春過程檢索。
They wanted a more ecphorable design for the room. 他們想要一個更可透過回春過程檢索的房間設計。

meaning: 作為記憶檢索的一部分，激活潛在的印跡。
sentences: They tried to ecphore the problem before lunch. 他們試著在午餐前作為記憶檢索的一部分這個問題。
Please ecphore the details before you send the report. 送出報告前，請先作為記憶檢索的一部分細節。

meaning: 記憶檢索的一個階段，其中潛在的印跡被激活
sentences: A familiar smell triggered ecphoria of an old memory. 熟悉的氣味引發一段舊記憶的喚起。
The therapist studied ecphoria during memory tests. 治療師在記憶測驗中研究記憶喚起。

meaning: 惊呼的同义词。
sentences: The poem used ecphorization to turn surprise into a shout. 這首詩用驚呼表達把驚訝變成呼喊。
Her sudden ecphorization startled everyone in the room. 她突然的驚呼讓房間裡所有人嚇了一跳。

meaning: 去迴聲。
sentences: They tried to ecphorize the problem before lunch. 他們試著在午餐前去迴聲這個問題。
Please ecphorize the details before you send the report. 送出報告前，請先去迴聲細節。

meaning: 罕用：對藝術作品或景象的生動文字描寫
sentences: The poem is an ecphrasis of a ruined temple painting. 這首詩是對一幅殘破廟宇壁畫的生動描寫。
In class, we discussed how ecphrasis can turn an image into a story. 課堂上我們討論了這種描寫如何把畫面轉化成故事。

meaning: 一種不受潮濕、衝擊和火影響的爆炸性物質，是由三硝基甲酚製備的甲磺酸銨與苦味酸的混合物。
sentences: The sudden ecrasite sent dust from the ceiling. 突如其來的埃克拉石從天花板上揚起灰塵。
After the ecrasite, workers checked the road for damage. 事故發生後，工人們檢查了道路是否有損壞。

meaning: 米色。
sentences: She wore an ecru sweater with brown buttons. 她穿了一件米色毛衣，配棕色鈕扣。
The curtains were ecru, not pure white. 窗簾是米色，不是純白色。

meaning: 不是硬殼的。
sentences: Her answer sounded ecrustaceous during the meeting. 她在會議中的回答聽起來很不是硬殼。
They wanted a more ecrustaceous design for the room. 他們想要一個更不是硬殼的房間設計。

meaning: 帕拉戈格的同義詞。
sentences: The grammar note treated ecstasis as an added final sound. 文法註解把 ecstasis 視為字尾增加音。
Ecstasis changed the rhythm of the old line. 字尾增音改變了那句古文的節奏。

meaning: 進入狂喜或狂喜的狀態。
sentences: They tried to ecstasize the problem before lunch. 他們試著在午餐前進入狂喜或狂喜的狀態這個問題。
Please ecstasize the details before you send the report. 送出報告前，請先進入狂喜或狂喜的狀態細節。

meaning: 一種如此強烈的情緒狀態，以至於一個人無法理性思考和自我控制。
sentences: an ecstasy of remorse 悔恨的狂喜
The term ecstasy refers to a state of emotion so intense that a person is carried beyond rational thought and self-control. 狂喜一詞指的是一種強烈到超越理性思維和自我控制的情緒狀態。

meaning: 與狂喜或過度情緒有關或由其引起。
sentences: ecstatic gaze ecstatic trance 欣喜若狂的凝視 欣喜若狂的恍惚
Something described as ecstatic is relating to, or caused by, ecstasy or excessive emotion. 被描述為狂喜的事物與狂喜或過度情緒有關或由狂喜或過度情緒引起。

meaning: 被認為具有高度敏感情緒狀態或容易出現準神秘恍惚狀態的女性。
sentences: The village called her an ecstatica because she often fell into trances. 村民稱她為容易入迷恍惚的女子。
An ecstatica appeared in the old religious story. 那則古老宗教故事中出現一位恍惚女子。

meaning: 欣喜若狂的同義詞。
sentences: The note sounded ecstatical, so the editor rewrote it. 這段文字聽起來很欣喜若狂，所以編輯把它改寫了。
She noticed an ecstatical tone in the short message. 她注意到短訊裡有一種欣喜若狂的語氣。

meaning: 欣喜若狂。
sentences: She spoke ecstatically when she answered the question. 她回答問題時說得很欣喜若狂地。
He handled the small mistake ecstatically and kept working. 他很欣喜若狂地處理小錯誤，然後繼續工作。

meaning: 對某事感到欣喜若狂。
sentences: They tried to ecstaticize the problem before lunch. 他們試著在午餐前對某事感到欣喜若狂這個問題。
Please ecstaticize the details before you send the report. 送出報告前，請先對某事感到欣喜若狂細節。

meaning: 一個罕見的或專門的英語術語，記錄為 ecstropy。
sentences: The surgeon corrected the child's ecstrophy. 外科醫師矯正孩子的外翻畸形。
Ecstrophy required careful care after the operation. 外翻畸形手術後需要細心照護。

meaning: 向外
sentences: She spoke ectad when she answered the question. 她回答問題時說得很向外地。
He handled the small mistake ectad and kept working. 他很向外地處理小錯誤，然後繼續工作。

meaning: 雄性昆蟲的外胚層附屬生殖腺之一
sentences: Researchers observed a ectadenia near the edge of the field at dawn. 研究人員在黎明時分在田野邊緣附近觀察到了一種外生植物。
The illustration showed the ectadenia in its natural setting. 插圖顯示了自然環境中的外溢體。

meaning: 與表面有關或位於表面附近；外。
sentences: The surgeon checked the ectal surface of the tissue. 外科醫師檢查組織的外側表面。
An ectal layer protected the softer part inside. 外層保護著裡面較柔軟的部分。

meaning: 以直接的方式或方向。
sentences: The falling seeds drifted ectally in the afternoon light. 落下的種子在午後的陽光下飄蕩。
The capsule slowly turned ectally before reentry. 膠囊在重返大氣層之前緩慢地轉向直腸。

meaning: 勃勃的同義詞。
sentences: The eye doctor found corneal ectasia during the exam. 眼科醫師在檢查中發現角膜擴張。
Ectasia made the blood vessel wider than normal. 擴張讓血管比正常更寬。

meaning: 通常是由於疾病或受傷而導致的身體中空或管狀部分的擴張或膨脹。
sentences: The scan showed ectasis in the small airway. 掃描顯示小氣道有擴張。
The doctor monitored the ectasis over several months. 醫生追蹤這個擴張情況好幾個月。

meaning: 屬於或與擴張有關的。
sentences: Her answer sounded ectatic during the meeting. 她在會議中的回答聽起來很擴張相關。
They wanted a more ectatic design for the room. 他們想要一個更擴張相關的房間設計。

meaning: 埃克特內的變體
sentences: The editor marked ectene as a variant spelling. 編輯把該字標為變體拼法。
The old note used ectene instead of the modern form. 舊筆記用了該變體，而不是現代拼法。

meaning: 與兩個原始胚層（外胚層和內胚層）相關或相關。
sentences: The diagram showed an ectental connection between the two germ layers. 圖示呈現兩個胚層之間的 ectental 關係。
Students labeled the ectental tissue during the biology lab. 學生在生物實驗中標出與兩個原始胚層相關的組織。

meaning: 肱骨外髁附近和上方
sentences: The doctor touched the ectepicondylar area near the patient's elbow. 醫生按壓病人手肘附近的肱骨外髁上方區域。
An ectepicondylar injury made it painful to lift the bag. 肱骨外髁附近的傷讓他提袋子時很痛。

meaning: 篩竇外部；前額骨（位於額骨前方）
sentences: The symptom looked ectethmoid, so the doctor checked it again. 症狀看起來很篩竇外部，所以醫生又檢查了一次。
She wrote down the ectethmoid sign in the health record. 她把這個篩竇外部的徵象記在健康紀錄裡。

meaning: 一個罕見的或專門的英語術語，記錄為 ectethmoidal。
sentences: Her answer sounded ectethmoidal during the meeting. 她在會議中的回答聽起來很ectethmoid。
They wanted a more ectethmoidal design for the room. 他們想要一個更ectethmoid的房間設計。

meaning: 就或透過 ecthesis 而言。
sentences: She spoke ecthetically when she answered the question. 她回答問題時說得很就或透過 ecthe地。
He handled the small mistake ecthetically and kept working. 他很就或透過 ecthe地處理小錯誤，然後繼續工作。

meaning: 在拉丁語中，在以元音開頭的單字之前省略最後一個 /m/ 以及前面的元音。
sentences: The Latin teacher marked ecthlipsis before the next vowel. 拉丁文老師標出下一個母音前的音省略。
Ecthlipsis removed the final sound in the old verse. 音省略讓那句古詩少了最後的音。

meaning: 由細菌引起的傳染性皮膚潰瘍性膿皮症。
sentences: The doctor treated ecthyma on the patient's lower leg. 醫生治療病人小腿上的膿痂疹。
Poor wound care made the ecthyma worse. 傷口照護不佳讓膿痂疹惡化。

meaning: 罕見或專門的英語術語，記錄為 ectiris。
sentences: The eye chart marked the ectiris near the outer iris. 眼部圖表標出虹膜外側附近的 ectiris。
The specialist examined the ectiris under bright light. 專科醫師在強光下檢查 ectiris。

meaning: 一個罕見的或專門的英語術語，記錄為 ectobatic。
sentences: The grammar note called the final clause ectobatic. 文法註解把最後的子句稱為 ectobatic。
The student missed the ectobatic use of the phrase. 學生漏看了這個片語的 ectobatic 用法。

meaning: 胚盤外層；外胚層或外胚層。
sentences: The ectoblast later developed into the outer layer of the embryo. 外胚層後來發育成胚胎的外層。
Students colored the ectoblast blue in the embryo diagram. 學生把胚胎圖中的外胚層塗成藍色。

meaning: 屬於外胚層的或與外胚層有關的。
sentences: The report described the finding as ectoblastic. 報告把這項發現描述為外胚層相關。
The doctor explained the ectoblastic result to the patient. 醫生向病人解釋這項外胚層相關結果。

meaning: 禽類中支氣管的背支或延長部分
sentences: The vet pointed to the ectobronchium in the bird diagram. 獸醫指著鳥類圖解中的外支氣管。
Air passed through the ectobronchium as the bird breathed. 鳥呼吸時，空氣通過外支氣管。

meaning: 先天性心臟移位
sentences: The newborn was diagnosed with ectocardia soon after birth. 新生兒出生不久後被診斷出先天性心臟移位。
Ectocardia required a team of heart specialists. 先天性心臟移位需要一組心臟專科醫師照護。

meaning: 主要是附生海洋褐藻（Ectocarpales）的一個世界性家族，包括具有由爬行絲或層產生的直立分枝絲的葉狀體的藻類，有時被壓實成假薄壁組織葉狀體
sentences: The biologist found ectocarpaceous algae on the wet rock. 生物學家在濕岩石上發現外子囊藻科的褐藻。
Ectocarpaceous filaments covered the shell in thin brown lines. 外子囊藻科的細絲以淡褐色細線覆蓋貝殼。

meaning: 與 Ectocarpus 屬的褐藻有關。
sentences: The sample contained ectocarpic algae from the harbor. 樣本中含有來自港口的 Ectocarpus 屬褐藻。
Ectocarpic growth appeared on the rope after a week in seawater. 繩子泡在海水一週後，出現 Ectocarpus 屬褐藻的生長。

meaning: 具有從外胚層發育而來的生殖器官－使用水母
sentences: The textbook described an ectocarpous stage in the jellyfish. 教科書描述水母的 ectocarpous 階段。
The ectocarpous organs developed from the outer layer. 這些 ectocarpous 器官由外層發育而來。

meaning: 一個罕見的或專門的英語術語，記錄為ectocinerea。
sentences: The brain diagram marked the ectocinerea in pale gray. 腦部圖用淡灰色標出 ectocinerea。
The researcher compared the ectocinerea with nearby tissue. 研究人員把 ectocinerea 和附近組織做比較。

meaning: 一個罕見的或專門的英語術語，記錄為 ectocinereal。
sentences: The anatomist marked the ectocinereal area on the brain diagram. 解剖學家在腦部圖上標出 ectocinereal 區域。
The ectocinereal layer appeared darker in the scan. 掃描中，ectocinereal 層看起來較深。

meaning: 一個罕見的或專門的英語術語，記錄為 eccocoelic。
sentences: The diagram showed an ectocoelic space near the embryo wall. 圖示顯示胚胎壁附近的 ectocoelic 空間。
The researcher measured the ectocoelic cavity under a microscope. 研究人員在顯微鏡下測量 ectocoelic 腔。

meaning: 與外髁相關
sentences: Her answer sounded ectocondylar during the meeting. 她在會議中的回答聽起來很與外髁相關。
They wanted a more ectocondylar design for the room. 他們想要一個更與外髁相關的房間設計。

meaning: 外髁（遠離身體的一側）
sentences: The doctor felt the ectocondyle during the knee exam. 醫生在膝蓋檢查時摸到外髁。
A small crack appeared near the ectocondyle in the X-ray. X 光片中，外髁附近出現一道小裂痕。

meaning: 骨的外側髁
sentences: The ectocondyloid part of the bone was slightly swollen. 骨頭的外側髁部位有點腫。
The trainer wrapped the ectocondyloid area after the fall. 跌倒後，教練包紮了外側髁區域。

meaning: 角膜外層
sentences: The eye doctor checked the ectocornea for scratches. 眼科醫師檢查角膜外層是否有刮傷。
Dust on the ectocornea made his eye water. 角膜外層有灰塵，讓他一直流眼淚。

meaning: 顱骨外部
sentences: The symptom looked ectocranial, so the doctor checked it again. 症狀看起來很顱骨外部，所以醫生又檢查了一次。
She wrote down the ectocranial sign in the health record. 她把這個顱骨外部的徵象記在健康紀錄裡。

meaning: 跗骨的骨頭之一。
sentences: The X-ray showed a fracture in the ectocuneiform. X 光顯示外楔骨有骨折。
She felt pain near the ectocuneiform after the long run. 長跑後，她外楔骨附近感到疼痛。

meaning: 罕見或專門的英語術語，記錄為 ectocuniform。
